We have used Ratte to find 6 previously-unknown miscompilation bugs in the production MLIR implementation. To our knowledge, Ratte is the first MLIR fuzzer capable of finding such bugs. Our work identified several aspects of the MLIR specification that were unclear, for which we proposed fixes that were adopted. Our technique provides composable reference interpreters for important MLIR dialects, validated against the production implementation, which can be used in future compiler development and testing research.
items.abstract_zh: 多级中间表示（MLIR）是一个快速发展的编译器框架，其定义特征是称为方言的模块化语言片段的生态系统。指定方言语义和验证方言实现提出了新的挑战，因为现有技术无法满足 MLIR 所需的模块化和可组合性。我们提出 Ratte，一个用于指定可组合方言语义和模块化方言模糊器的框架。我们引入了一种用于开发 MLIR 方言的语义和模糊器的新技术，实现了模糊器通过测试用例生成验证语义的和谐循环，同时语义允许生成不受未定义行为影响的高质量测试用例。语义和模糊器的可组合性允许以廉价的方式派生生成器来测试方言的组合。我们使用 Ratte 在生产 MLIR 实现中发现了 6 个以前未知的编译错误错误。据我们所知，Ratte 是第一个能够发现此类错误的 MLIR 模糊器。我们的工作确定了 MLIR 规范中尚不清楚的几个方面，并提出了修复建议。我们的技术为重要的 MLIR 方言提供了可组合的参考解释器，并针对生产实现进行了验证，可用于未来的编译器开发和测试研究。

items.title: Hierarchical Prefetching: A Software-Hardware Instruction Prefetcher for Server Applications.
items.abstract: The large working set of instructions in server-side applications causes a significant bottleneck in the front-end, even for high-performance processors equipped with fetch-directed instruction prefetching (FDIP). Prefetchers specifically designed for server scenarios typically rely on a record-and-replay mechanism that exploits the repetitiveness of instruction sequences. However, the efficacy of these techniques is compromised by discrepancies between actual and predicted control flows, resulting in loss of coverage and timeliness. This paper proposes Hierarchical Prefetching, a novel approach that tackles the limitations of existing prefetchers. It identifies common coarse-grained functionality blocks (called Bundles) within the server code and prefetches them as a whole. Bundles are significantly larger than typical prefetch targets, encompassing tens to hundreds of kilobytes of code. The approach combines simple software analysis of code for bundle formation and light-weight hardware for record-and-replay prefetching. The prefetcher requires under 2KB of on-chip storage by keeping most of the metadata in main memory. Experiments with 11 popular server workloads reveal that Hierarchical Prefetching significantly improves miss coverage and timeliness over prior techniques, achieving a 6.6% average performance gain over FDIP.
items.abstract_zh: 服务器端应用程序中的大量工作指令集会导致前端出现严重瓶颈，即使对于配备了直接取指指令预取 (FDIP) 的高性能处理器也是如此。专为服务器场景设计的预取器通常依赖于利用指令序列的重复性的记录和重放机制。然而，这些技术的功效因实际控制流和预测控制流之间的差异而受到影响，从而导致覆盖范围和及时性的损失。本文提出了分层预取，这是一种解决现有预取器局限性的新方法。它识别服务器代码中常见的粗粒度功能块（称为捆绑包）并将它们作为一个整体进行预取。捆绑包比典型的预取目标大得多，包含数十到数百 KB 的代码。该方法结合了用于捆绑形成的简单代码软件分析和用于记录和重放预取的轻量级硬件。通过将大部分元数据保存在主存储器中，预取器需要不到 2KB 的片上存储空间。对 11 种流行服务器工作负载进行的实验表明，与现有技术相比，分层预取显着提高了缺失覆盖率和及时性，与 FDIP 相比，平均性能提高了 6.6%。

items.title: Pirate: No Compromise Low-Bandwidth VR Streaming for Edge Devices.
items.abstract: Due to the limited compute power and storage capabilities of edge platforms, ''streaming'' often provides a better VR experience compared to ''rendering''. Yet, achieving high-quality VR streaming faces two significant challenges, namely, bandwidth limitations and the need for real-time operation with high frames per second (FPS). Previous efforts have tended to prioritize either conserving bandwidth without real-time performance or ensuring real-time operation without substantial bandwidth savings. In this work, we incorporate the concept of ''stereo similarity'' to develop a novel real-time stereo video compression framework for streaming, called Pirate. Unlike the previously proposed approaches that rely on large machine learning-based models for synthesizing stereo pairs from both eyes with disparity maps (which can be impractical for most edge platforms due to their high computational cost), Pirate iteratively synthesizes the target eye view using only a single eye view and its corresponding disparity and optical flow information, with alternating left or right eye transmission. This enables us to generate target view at an extremely low computational cost, even under bandwidth constraints as low as 0.1 bits per pixel (bpp), while maintaining a high frame rate of 90 FPS. Our evaluations also reveal that, the proposed approach not only achieves real-time VR streaming with a 20%-40% reduction in bandwidth usage, but also maintains similar superior quality standards.
items.abstract_zh: 由于边缘平台的计算能力和存储能力有限，“流媒体”通常比“渲染”提供更好的 VR 体验。然而，实现高质量的 VR 流媒体面临两个重大挑战，即带宽限制和高每秒帧数 (FPS) 实时操作的需求。以前的努力往往优先考虑在没有实时性能的情况下节省带宽，或者在没有大量节省带宽的情况下确保实时操作。在这项工作中，我们结合了“立体相似性”的概念来开发一种新颖的流媒体实时立体视频压缩框架，称为 Pirate。与先前提出的依赖于基于大型机器学习的模型来合成具有视差图的双眼立体对的方法不同（由于其高计算成本，这对于大多数边缘平台来说可能是不切实际的），Pirate 仅使用单眼视图及其相应的视差和光流信息迭代地合成目标眼视图，并交替左眼或右眼传输。这使我们能够以极低的计算成本生成目标视图，即使在低至每像素 0.1 位 (bpp) 的带宽限制下也是如此，同时保持 90 FPS 的高帧速率。我们的评估还表明，所提出的方法不仅实现了实时 VR 流媒体传输，带宽使用量减少了 20%-40%，而且还保持了类似的卓越质量标准。

items.title: Be CIM or Be Memory: A Dual-mode-aware DNN Compiler for CIM Accelerators.
items.abstract: Computing-in-memory (CIM) architectures demonstrate superior performance over traditional architectures. To unleash the potential of CIM accelerators, many compilation methods have been proposed, focusing on application scheduling optimization specific to CIM. However, existing compilation methods often overlook CIM's capability to switch dynamically between compute and memory modes, which is crucial for accommodating the diverse memory and computational needs of real-world deep neural network architectures, especially the emerging large language models. To fill this gap, we introduce CMSwitch, a novel compiler to optimize resource allocation for CIM accelerators with adaptive mode-switching capabilities, thereby enhancing the performance of DNN applications. Specifically, our approach integrates the compute-memory mode switch into the CIM compilation optimization space by introducing a new hardware abstraction attribute. Then, we propose a novel compilation optimization pass that identifies the optimal network segment and the corresponding mode resource allocations using dynamic programming and mixed-integer programming. CMSwitch uses the tailored meta-operator to express the compilation result in a generalized manner. Evaluation results demonstrate that CMSwitch achieves an average speedup of 1.31x compared to existing SOTA CIM compilation works, highlighting CMSwitch's effectiveness in fully exploiting the potential of CIM processors for a wide range of real-world DNN applications.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (CIM) 架构表现出优于传统架构的性能。为了释放 CIM 加速器的潜力，人们提出了许多编译方法，重点关注特定于 CIM 的应用程序调度优化。然而，现有的编译方法经常忽视 CIM 在计算和内存模式之间动态切换的能力，这对于适应现实世界深度神经网络架构（尤其是新兴的大型语言模型）的多样化内存和计算需求至关重要。为了填补这一空白，我们引入了 CMSwitch，这是一种新型编译器，可以优化具有自适应模式切换功能的 CIM 加速器的资源分配，从而提高 DNN 应用程序的性能。具体来说，我们的方法通过引入新的硬件抽象属性，将计算内存模式开关集成到 CIM 编译优化空间中。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的编译优化过程，它使用动态规划和混合整数规划来识别最佳网段和相应的模式资源分配。 CMSwitch使用定制的元运算符以通用的方式表达编译结果。评估结果表明，与现有的 SOTA CIM 编译工作相比，CMSwitch 的平均加速速度为 1.31 倍，凸显了 CMSwitch 在充分挖掘 CIM 处理器在各种实际 DNN 应用中的潜力方面的有效性。

items.title: Squeezing Operator Performance Potential for the Ascend Architecture.
items.abstract: With the rise of deep learning, many companies have developed domain-specific architectures (DSAs) optimized for AI workloads, with Ascend being a representative. To fully realize the operator performance on Ascend, effective analysis and optimization is urgently needed. Compared to GPU, Ascend requires users to manage operations manually, leading to complex performance issues that require precise analysis. However, existing roofline models face challenges of visualization complexity and inaccurate performance assessment. To address these needs, we introduce a component-based roofline model that abstracts components to capture operator performance, thereby effectively identifying bottleneck components. Furthermore, through practical operator optimization case studies, we illustrate a comprehensive process of optimization based on roofline analysis, summarizing common performance issues and optimization strategies. Finally, extensive end-to-end optimization experiments demonstrate significant model speed improvements, ranging from 1.07× to 2.15×, along with valuable insights from practice.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的兴起，许多公司开发了针对人工智能工作负载优化的领域特定架构（DSA），升腾就是其中的代表。为了充分认识Ascend上的算子性能，迫切需要有效的分析和优化。与GPU相比，Ascend需要用户手动管理操作，导致性能问题复杂，需要精确分析。然而，现有的屋顶线模型面临可视化复杂性和性能评估不准确的挑战。为了满足这些需求，我们引入了基于组件的车顶线模型，该模型通过抽象组件来捕获操作员的性能，从而有效地识别瓶颈组件。此外，通过实际算子优化案例研究，阐述了基于车顶线分析的综合优化流程，总结了常见的性能问题和优化策略。最后，广泛的端到端优化实验证明了模型速度的显着提升（从 1.07 倍到 2.15 倍），以及来自实践的宝贵见解。

items.title: Controlled Preemption: Amplifying Side-Channel Attacks from Userspace.
items.abstract:
Microarchitectural side channels are an ongoing threat in today's systems. Yet, many side-channel methodologies suffer from low temporal resolution measurement, which can either preclude or significantly complicate an attack.

This paper introduces Controlled Preemption an attack primitive enabling a single unprivileged (user-level) attacker thread to repeatedly preempt a victim thread after colocating with that victim thread on the same logical core. Between preemptions, the victim thread executes zero to several instructions---sufficiently few to enable high-resolution side channel measurements.

The key idea in Controlled Preemption is to exploit scheduler fairness heuristics. Namely, that modern thread schedulers give a thread A the ability to preempt another thread B until a fairness tripwire (signaling that A is starving B ) fires. We show how this idea enables hundreds of short preemptions before tripping the fairness tripwire is robust to noise and applies to both the Linux CFS and EEVDF schedulers. We also develop a technique that helps colocate the attacker and victim threads onto the same logical core, an attacker capability overlooked by prior work.

Our evaluation tests Controlled Preemption in the context of several different victim programs, victim privilege levels (inside and outside of Intel SGX) and choices of side channel. In each attack, we demonstrate results that are competitive with prior work but make fewer assumptions (e.g., require only user-level privilege or require fewer colocated attacker threads).
items.abstract_zh:
微架构侧通道是当今系统中持续存在的威胁。然而，许多旁路方法都受到低时间分辨率测量的影响，这可能会阻止攻击或使攻击显着复杂化。

本文介绍了受控抢占，这是一种攻击原语，使单个非特权（用户级）攻击者线程能够在与受害者线程位于同一逻辑核心上后重复抢占受害者线程。在抢占之间，受害者线程执行零到几条指令——数量足够少以实现高分辨率侧通道测量。

受控抢占的关键思想是利用调度程序公平启发法。也就是说，现代线程调度程序赋予线程 A 抢占另一个线程 B 的能力，直到公平绊线（表示 A 正在挨饿 B ）触发。我们展示了这个想法如何在触发公平性之前实现数百次短暂抢占，绊线对噪声具有鲁棒性，并且适用于 Linux CFS 和 EEVDF 调度程序。我们还开发了一种技术，有助于将攻击者和受害者线程并置到同一逻辑核心上，这是以前的工作所忽视的攻击者能力。

我们的评估在几个不同的受害者程序、受害者权限级别（英特尔 SGX 内部和外部）和侧通道选择的上下文中测试了受控抢占。在每次攻击中，我们都展示了与之前的工作相媲美的结果，但做出了更少的假设（例如，仅需要用户级权限或需要更少的共置攻击者线程）。

items.title: Gigaflow: Pipeline-Aware Sub-Traversal Caching for Modern SmartNICs.
items.abstract:
The success of modern public/edge clouds hinges heavily on the performance of their end-host network stacks if they are to support the emerging and diverse tenants' workloads (e.g., distributed training in the cloud to fast inference at the edge). Virtual Switches (vSwitches) are vital components of this stack, providing a unified interface to enforce high-level policies on incoming packets and route them to physical interfaces, containers, or virtual machines. As performance demands escalate, there has been a shift toward offloading vSwitch processing to SmartNICs to alleviate CPU load and improve efficiency. However, existing solutions struggle to handle the growing flow rule space within the NIC, leading to high miss rates and poor scalability.

In this paper, we introduce G igaflow , a novel caching system tailored for deployment on SmartNICs to accelerate vSwitch packet processing. Our core insight is that by harnessing the inherent pipeline-aware locality within programmable vSwitch pipelines-defining policies (e.g., L2, L3, and ACL) and their execution order (e.g., using P4 and OpenFlow)-we can create cache rules for shared segments (sub-traversals) within the pipeline, rather than caching entire flows. These shared segments can be reused across multiple flows, resulting in higher cache efficiency and greater rule-space coverage. Our evaluations show that G igaflow achieves up to a 51% improvement in cache hit rate (average 25% improvement) over traditional caching solutions (i.e., Megaflow), while capturing up to 450x more rule space within the limited memory of today's SmartNICs-all while operating at line speed.
items.abstract_zh:
现代公共/边缘云的成功在很大程度上取决于其终端主机网络堆栈的性能，如果它们要支持新兴和多样化的租户工作负载（例如，云中的分布式训练到边缘的快速推理）。虚拟交换机 (vSwitch) 是该堆栈的重要组件，提供统一的接口来对传入数据包实施高级策略并将其路由到物理接口、容器或虚拟机。随着性能需求的不断升级，人们开始转向将 vSwitch 处理卸载到 SmartNIC，以减轻 CPU 负载并提高效率。然而，现有的解决方案难以处理 NIC 内不断增长的流规则空间，导致高丢失率和较差的可扩展性。

在本文中，我们介绍了 G igaflow，这是一种专为部署在 SmartNIC 上而定制的新型缓存系统，以加速 vSwitch 数据包处理。我们的核心见解是，通过利用可编程 vSwitch 管道中固有的管道感知局部性——定义策略（例如，L2、L3 和 ACL）及其执行顺序（例如，使用 P4 和 OpenFlow）——我们可以为管道内的共享段（子遍历）创建缓存规则，而不是缓存整个流。这些共享段可以在多个流中重用，从而提高缓存效率和更大的规则空间覆盖范围。我们的评估表明，与传统缓存解决方案（即 Megaflow）相比，G igaflow 的缓存命中率提高了 51%（平均提高了 25%），同时在当今 SmartNIC 的有限内存内捕获了多达 450 倍的规则空间，而且所有这些都以线速运行。

items.title: Early Termination for Hyperdimensional Computing Using Inferential Statistics.
items.abstract:
Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) is a brain-inspired, lightweight computing paradigm that has shown great potential for inference on the edge and on emerging hardware technologies, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on certain classification tasks. HDC classifiers are inherently error resilient and support early termination of inference to approximate classification results. Practitioners have developed heuristic methods to terminate inference early for individual inputs, reducing the computation of inference at the cost of accuracy. These techniques lack statistical guarantees and may unacceptably degrade classification accuracy or terminate inference later than is needed to obtain an accuracy result.

We present Omen, the first dynamic HDC optimizer that uses inferential statistics to terminate inference early while providing accuracy guarantees. To realize Omen, we develop a statistical view of HDC that reframes HD computations as statistical sampling and testing tasks, enabling the use of statistical tests. We evaluate Omen on 19 benchmark instantiations of four classification tasks. Omen is computationally efficient, delivering up to 7.21--12.18× inference speed-ups over an unoptimized baseline while only incurring a 0.0--0.7% drop in accuracy. Omen outperforms heuristic methods, achieving an additional 0.04--5.85× inference speed-up over the unoptimized baseline compared to heuristic methods while maintaining higher or comparable accuracy.
items.abstract_zh:
超维计算 (HDC) 是一种受大脑启发的轻量级计算范式，它在边缘和新兴硬件技术上显示出巨大的推理潜力，在某些分类任务上实现了最先进的准确性。 HDC 分类器本质上具有容错能力，并支持提前终止推理以近似分类结果。从业者已经开发了启发式方法来提前终止各个输入的推理，以牺牲准确性为代价减少推理的计算。这些技术缺乏统计保证，并且可能会不可接受地降低分类准确性，或者晚于获得准确性结果所需的时间终止推理。

我们推出了 Omen，这是第一个动态 HDC 优化器，它使用推理统计提前终止推理，同时提供准确性保证。为了实现 Omen，我们开发了 HDC 的统计视图，将 HD 计算重新构建为统计采样和测试任务，从而能够使用统计测试。我们在四个分类任务的 19 个基准实​​例上评估 Omen。 Omen 的计算效率很高，与未优化的基线相比，推理速度提高了 7.21--12.18 倍，而准确度仅下降了 0.0--0.7%。 Omen 的性能优于启发式方法，与启发式方法相比，在未优化的基线上实现额外 0.04--5.85 倍的推理加速，同时保持更高或相当的精度。

items.title: Mint: Cost-Efficient Tracing with All Requests Collection via Commonality and Variability Analysis.
items.abstract:
Distributed traces contain valuable information but are often massive in volume, posing a core challenge in tracing framework design: balancing the tradeoff between preserving essential trace information and reducing trace volume. To address this tradeoff, previous approaches typically used a '1 or 0' sampling strategy: retaining sampled traces while completely discarding unsampled ones. However, based on an empirical study on real-world production traces, we discover that the '1 or 0' strategy actually fails to effectively balance this tradeoff.

To achieve a more balanced outcome, we shift the strategy from the '1 or 0' paradigm to the 'commonality + variability' paradigm. The core of 'commonality + variability' paradigm is to first parse traces into common patterns and variable parameters, then aggregate the patterns and filter the parameters. We propose a cost-efficient tracing framework, Mint, which implements the 'commonality + variability' paradigm on the agent side to enable all requests capturing. Our experiments show that Mint can capture all traces and retain more trace information while optimizing trace storage (reduced to an average of 2.7%) and network overhead (reduced to an average of 4.2%). Moreover, experiments also demonstrate that Mint is lightweight enough for production use.
items.abstract_zh:
分布式跟踪包含有价值的信息，但通常数量庞大，这对跟踪框架设计提出了核心挑战：在保留基本跟踪信息和减少跟踪量之间进行权衡。为了解决这种权衡问题，以前的方法通常使用“1 或 0”采样策略：保留采样轨迹，同时完全丢弃未采样轨迹。然而，基于对现实世界生产轨迹的实证研究，我们发现“1或0”策略实际上未能有效平衡这种权衡。

为了实现更平衡的结果，我们将策略从“1或0”范式转变为“共性+可变性”范式。 “共性+可变性”范式的核心是首先将痕迹解析为公共模式和可变参数，然后聚合模式并过滤参数。我们提出了一种经济高效的跟踪框架 Mint，它在代理端实现了“通用性+可变性”范式，以实现所有请求捕获。我们的实验表明，Mint 可以捕获所有痕迹并保留更多痕迹信息，同时优化痕迹存储（平均减少到 2.7%）和网络开销（平均减少到 4.2%）。此外，实验还表明 Mint 足够轻量，适合生产使用。

items.title: AnyKey: A Key-Value SSD for All Workload Types.
items.abstract: Key-value solid-state drives (KV-SSDs) are considered as a potential storage solution for large-scale key-value (KV) store applications. Unfortunately, the existing KV-SSD designs are tuned for a specific type of workload, namely, those in which the size of the values are much larger than the size of the keys. Interestingly, there also exists another type of workload, in practice, in which the sizes of keys are relatively large. We re-evaluate the current KV-SSD designs using such unexplored workloads and document their significantly-degraded performance. Observing that the performance problem stems from the increased size of the metadata, we subsequently propose a novel KV-SSD design, called AnyKey, which prevents the size of the metadata from increasing under varying sizes of keys. Our detailed evaluation using a wide range of real-life workloads indicates that AnyKey outperforms the state-of-the-art KV-SSD design under different types of workloads with varying sizes of keys and values.
items.abstract_zh: 键值固态硬盘（KV-SSD）被认为是大规模键值（KV）存储应用的潜在存储解决方案。不幸的是，现有的 KV-SSD 设计是针对特定类型的工作负载进行调整的，即那些值的大小远大于键的大小的工作负载。有趣的是，实际上还存在另一种类型的工作负载，其中密钥的大小相对较大。我们使用此类未探索的工作负载重新评估当前的 KV-SSD 设计，并记录其显着下降的性能。观察到性能问题源于元数据大小的增加，我们随后提出了一种新颖的 KV-SSD 设计，称为 AnyKey，它可以防止元数据的大小在不同大小的键下增加。我们使用各种实际工作负载进行的详细评估表明，在具有不同大小的键和值的不同类型的工作负载下，AnyKey 的性能优于最先进的 KV-SSD 设计。

items.title: PipeLLM: Fast and Confidential Large Language Model Services with Speculative Pipelined Encryption.
items.abstract: Confidential computing on GPUs, like NVIDIA H100, mitigates the security risks of outsourced Large Language Models (LLMs) by implementing strong isolation and data encryption. Nonetheless, this encryption incurs a significant performance overhead, reaching up to 52.8% and 88.2% throughput drop when serving OPT-30B and OPT-66B, respectively. To address this challenge, we introduce PipeLLM, a user-transparent runtime system. PipeLLM removes the overhead by overlapping the encryption and GPU computation through pipelining-an idea inspired by the CPU instruction pipelining-thereby effectively concealing the latency increase caused by encryption. The primary technical challenge is that, unlike CPUs, the encryption module lacks prior knowledge of the specific data needing encryption until it is requested by the GPUs. To this end, we propose speculative pipelined encryption to predict the data requiring encryption by analyzing the serving patterns of LLMs. Further, we have developed an efficient, low-cost pipeline relinquishing approach for instances of incorrect predictions. Our experiments show that compared with vanilla systems without confidential computing (e.g., vLLM, PEFT, and FlexGen), PipeLLM incurs modest overhead ( < 19.6% in throughput) across various LLM sizes, from 13B to 175B. PipeLLM's source code is available at https://github.com/SJTU-IPADS/PipeLLM.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 上的机密计算（例如 NVIDIA H100）通过实施强隔离和数据加密来降低外包大型语言模型 (LLM) 的安全风险。尽管如此，这种加密会带来显着的性能开销，在为 OPT-30B 和 OPT-66B 提供服务时，吞吐量分别下降高达 52.8% 和 88.2%。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 PipeLLM，一个用户透明的运行时系统。 PipeLLM 通过流水线重叠加密和 GPU 计算来消除开销（这一想法受到 CPU 指令流水线的启发），从而有效隐藏加密带来的延迟增加。主要的技术挑战是，与 CPU 不同，加密模块在 GPU 请求之前缺乏对需要加密的特定数据的先验知识。为此，我们提出推测性流水线加密，通过分析法学硕士的服务模式来预测需要加密的数据。此外，我们还针对错误预测的情况开发了一种高效、低成本的管道放弃方法。我们的实验表明，与没有机密计算的普通系统（例如 vLLM、PEFT 和 FlexGen）相比，PipeLLM 在各种 LLM 大小（从 13B 到 175B）上产生适度的开销（吞吐量 < 19.6%）。 PipeLLM 的源代码可在 https://github.com/SJTU-IPADS/PipeLLM 获取。

items.title: Cooperative Graceful Degradation in Containerized Clouds.
items.abstract: Cloud resilience is crucial for cloud operators and the myriad of applications that rely on the cloud. Today, we lack a mechanism that enables cloud operators to perform graceful degradation of applications while satisfying the application's availability requirements. In this paper, we put forward a vision for automated cloud resilience management with cooperative graceful degradation between applications and cloud operators. First, we investigate techniques for graceful degradation and identify an opportunity for cooperative graceful degradation in public clouds. Second, leveraging criticality tags on containers, we propose diagonal scaling---turning off non-critical containers during capacity crunch scenarios---to maximize the availability of critical services. Third, we design Phoenix, an automated cloud resilience management system that maximizes critical service availability of applications while also considering operator objectives, thereby improving the overall resilience of the infrastructure during failures. We experimentally show that the Phoenix controller running atop Kubernetes can improve critical service availability by up to 2× during large-scale failures. Phoenix can handle failures in a cluster of 100,000 nodes within 10 seconds. We also develop AdaptLab, an open-source resilience benchmarking framework that can emulate realistic cloud environments with real-world application dependency graphs.
items.abstract_zh: 云弹性对于云运营商和依赖云的无数应用程序至关重要。如今，我们缺乏一种机制，使云运营商能够在满足应用程序可用性要求的同时对应用程序进行优雅的降级。在本文中，我们提出了自动化云弹性管理的愿景，以及应用程序和云运营商之间合作的优雅降级。首先，我们研究了优雅降级的技术，并确定了在公共云中进行合作式优雅降级的机会。其次，利用容器上的关键性标签，我们提出对角扩展（在容量紧缩场景中关闭非关键容器），以最大限度地提高关键服务的可用性。第三，我们设计了Phoenix，这是一个自动化的云弹性管理系统，可以最大限度地提高应用程序的关键服务可用性，同时还考虑运营商的目标，从而提高基础设施在故障期间的整体弹性。我们通过实验证明，在 Kubernetes 之上运行的 Phoenix 控制器可以在大规模故障期间将关键服务的可用性提高多达 2 倍。 Phoenix可以在10秒内处理10万个节点的集群中的故障。我们还开发了 AdaptLab，这是一个开源弹性基准测试框架，可以使用真实世界的应用程序依赖关系图来模拟真实的云环境。

items.title: PartIR: Composing SPMD Partitioning Strategies for Machine Learning.
items.abstract: Training modern large neural networks (NNs) requires a combination of parallelization strategies, including data, model, or optimizer sharding. To address the growing complexity of these strategies, we introduce PartIR, a hardware-and-runtime agnostic NN partitioning system. PartIR is: 1) Expressive: It allows for the composition of multiple sharding strategies, whether user-defined or automatically derived; 2) Decoupled: the strategies are separate from the ML implementation; and 3) Predictable: It follows a set of well-defined general rules to partition the NN. PartIR utilizes a schedule-like API that incrementally rewrites the ML program intermediate representation (IR) after each strategy, allowing simulators and users to verify the strategy's performance. PartIR has been successfully used both for training large models and across diverse model architectures, demonstrating its predictability, expressiveness, and performance.
items.abstract_zh: 训练现代大型神经网络 (NN) 需要结合并行化策略，包括数据、模型或优化器分片。为了解决这些策略日益复杂的问题，我们引入了 PartIR，一种与硬件和运行时无关的神经网络分区系统。 PartIR是： 1）富有表现力：它允许组合多种分片策略，无论是用户定义的还是自动派生的； 2）解耦：策略与机器学习实现是分开的； 3）可预测：它遵循一组明确定义的一般规则来划分神经网络。 PartIR 利用类似调度的 API，在每个策略之后逐步重写 ML 程序中间表示 (IR)，从而允许模拟器和用户验证策略的性能。 PartIR 已成功用于训练大型模型和跨不同模型架构，展示了其可预测性、表达力和性能。

items.title: Efficient Lossless Compression of Scientific Floating-Point Data on CPUs and GPUs.
items.abstract: The amount of scientific data being produced, transferred, and processed increases rapidly. Whereas GPUs have made faster processing possible, storage limitations and slow data transfers remain key bottlenecks. Data compression can help, but only if it does not create a new bottleneck. This paper presents four new lossless compression algorithms for single- and double-precision data that compress well and are fast even though they are fully compatible between CPUs and GPUs. Averaged over many SDRBench inputs, our implementations outperform most of the 18 compressors from the literature we compare to in compression ratio, compression throughput, and decompression throughput. Moreover, they outperform all of them in either throughput or compression ratio on the two CPUs and two GPUs we used for evaluation. For example, on an RTX 4090 GPU, our fastest code compresses and decompresses at over 500 GB/s while delivering one of the highest compression ratios.
items.abstract_zh: 产生、传输和处理的科学数据量迅速增加。尽管 GPU 使更快的处理成为可能，但存储限制和缓慢的数据传输仍然是关键瓶颈。数据压缩可以提供帮助，但前提是它不会造成新的瓶颈。本文提出了四种新的用于单精度和双精度数据的无损压缩算法，尽管它们在 CPU 和 GPU 之间完全兼容，但压缩效果良好且速度快。对许多 SDRBench 输入进行平均，我们的实现在压缩比、压缩吞吐量和解压缩吞吐量方面优于我们比较的文献中的 18 种压缩器中的大多数。此外，在我们用于评估的两个 CPU 和两个 GPU 上，它们在吞吐量或压缩比方面都优于所有这些。例如，在 RTX 4090 GPU 上，我们最快的代码压缩和解压缩速度超过 500 GB/s，同时提供最高的压缩比之一。

items.title: Marionette: A RowHammer Attack via Row Coupling.
items.abstract:
A body of recent work has revealed that two different rows in a DRAM bank, from the perspective of a processor-memory interface, are connected to the same wordline but two separate row buffers (bitline sense amplifiers) in certain DRAM chips. Such a pair of rows is referred to as a ''coupled-row pair.'' Coupled-row pairs pose a substantial security threat as RowHammer bitflips can be caused not only by the conventional, adjacent aggressor rows but also by their coupled rows that are distant in physical address

We investigate the impact of a coupled row on both FPGA-based infrastructure and server systems. In RowHammer attacks, coupled rows have hammering strength nearly identical to aggressor rows, with these attacks invisible to conventional, processor-side mitigation solutions. By exploiting these observations, we present Marionette, a new type of RowHammer attack that exploits coupled rows to extend the existing RowHammer attack surface.

First, coupled rows enable an attacker to evade two types of existing software-based RowHammer defenses: tracking- and isolation-based defenses. We induce RowHammer bitflips successfully against tracking-based RowHammer defenses by silently hammering coupled rows. We also identify the feasibility of RowHammer bitflips in an isolation-based inter-VM RowHammer defense by breaking DRAM-subarray-level isolation. Second, we successfully conduct an existing RowHammer exploit in a server under the tracking-based RowHammer defense. In a native server system, Marionette enhances the success rate of the RowHammer exploit by up to 1.66x. Lastly, we explore lightweight mitigation schemes for Marionette by exposing the coupled-row relationship to systems.
items.abstract_zh:
最近的大量工作表明，从处理器-内存接口的角度来看，DRAM 存储体中的两个不同行连接到同一字线，但某些 DRAM 芯片中连接到两个单独的行缓冲器（位线读出放大器）。这样的一对行被称为“耦合行对”。耦合行对构成了重大的安全威胁，因为 RowHammer 位翻转不仅可以由传统的相邻攻击者行引起，还可以由其物理地址相距较远的耦合行引起

我们研究了耦合行对基于 FPGA 的基础设施和服务器系统的影响。在 RowHammer 攻击中，耦合行的打击强度几乎与攻击者行相同，这些攻击对于传统的处理器端缓解解决方案来说是不可见的。通过利用这些观察结果，我们提出了 Marionette，一种新型的 RowHammer 攻击，它利用耦合行来扩展现有的 RowHammer 攻击面。

首先，耦合行使攻击者能够逃避两种现有的基于软件的 RowHammer 防御：基于跟踪和隔离的防御。我们通过默默地锤击耦合的行，成功地诱导 RowHammer 位翻转来对抗基于跟踪的 RowHammer 防御。我们还通过打破 DRAM 子阵列级隔离来确定 RowHammer 位翻转在基于隔离的 VM 间 RowHammer 防御中的可行性。其次，我们在基于跟踪的 RowHammer 防御下成功地在服务器中执行了现有的 RowHammer 漏洞利用。在本机服务器系统中，Marionette 将 RowHammer 漏洞利用的成功率提高了 1.66 倍。最后，我们通过向系统公开耦合行关系来探索 Marionette 的轻量级缓解方案。

items.title: Rethinking Java Performance Analysis.
items.abstract:
Representative workloads and principled methodologies are the foundation of performance analysis, which in turn provides the empirical grounding for much of the innovation in systems research. However, benchmarks are hard to maintain, methodologies are hard to develop, and our field moves fast. The tension between our fast-moving fields and their need to maintain their methodological foundations is a serious challenge. This paper explores that challenge through the lens of Java performance analysis. Lessons we draw extend to other languages and other fields of computer science.

In this paper we: i) introduce a complete overhaul of the DaCapo benchmark suite, [6] characterizing 22 new and/or refreshed workloads across 47 dimensions, using principal components analysis to demonstrate their diversity, ii) demonstrate new methodologies and how they are integrated into an easy to use framework, iii) use this framework to conduct an analysis of the state of the art in production Java performance, and iv) motivate the need to invest in renewed methodologies and workloads, using as an example a review of contemporary production garbage collector performance.

We highlight the danger of allowing methodologies to lag innovation and respond with a suite and new methodologies that nudge forward some of our field's methodological foundations. We offer guidance on maintaining the empirical rigor we need to encourage profitable research directions and quickly identify unprofitable ones.
items.abstract_zh:
代表性工作负载和原则性方法是性能分析的基础，而性能分析又为系统研究中的许多创新提供了经验基础。然而，基准很难维持，方法论很难开发，而且我们的领域发展得很快。我们快速发展的领域与维持其方法论基础的需要之间的紧张关系是一个严峻的挑战。本文通过 Java 性能分析的视角探讨了这一挑战。我们吸取的教训扩展到其他语言和计算机科学的其他领域。

在本文中，我们：i) 介绍对 DaCapo 基准套件的全面检修，[6] 描述 47 个维度的 22 个新的和/或更新的工作负载，使用主成分分析来展示其多样性，ii) 演示新的方法以及如何将它们集成到易于使用的框架中，iii) 使用该框架对生产 Java 性能的最新技术进行分析，iv) 激发投资于更新的方法和工作负载的需要，以回顾当代生产垃圾收集器的性能。

我们强调了允许方法论落后于创新的危险，并以一套新的方法论来应对，这些方法论推动了我们领域的一些方法论基础。我们提供有关保持实证严谨性的指导，以鼓励有利可图的研究方向并快速识别无利可图的研究方向。

items.title: Faster Chaitin-like Register Allocation via Grammatical Decompositions of Control-Flow Graphs.
items.abstract:
It is well-known that control-flow graphs (CFGs) of structured programs are sparse. This sparsity has been previously formalized in terms of graph parameters such as treewidth and pathwidth and used to design faster parameterized algorithms for numerous compiler optimization, model checking and program analysis tasks.

In this work, we observe that the known graph sparsity parameters fail to exactly capture the kind of sparsity exhibited by CFGs. For example, while all structured CFGs have a treewidth of at most 7, not every graph with a treewidth of 7 or less is realizable as a CFG. As a result, current parameterized algorithms are solving the underlying graph problems over a more general family of graphs than the CFGs.

To address this problem, we design a new but natural concept of graph decomposition based on a grammar that precisely captures the set of graphs that can be realized as CFGs of programs. We show that our notion of decomposition enables the same type of dynamic programming algorithms that are often used in treewidth/pathwidth-based methods. As two concrete applications, using our grammatical decomposition of CFGs, we provide asymptotically more efficient algorithms for two variants of the classical problem of register allocation as defined by Chaitin, i.e. assigning program variables to a limited number of registers such that variables with intersecting lifetimes are not assigned to the same register. Note that Chaitin's formulation of register allocation does not allow live-range splitting. Our algorithms are asymptotically faster not only in comparison with the non-parameterized solutions for these problems, but also compared to the state-of-the-art treewidth/pathwidth-based approaches in the literature. For minimum-cost register allocation over a fixed number of registers, we provide an algorithm with a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 5 ⋅ r ) where | G | is the size of the program, 𝕈 is the set of program variables and r is the number of registers. In contrast, the previous treewidth-based algorithm had a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 16 ⋅ r ). For the decision problem of spill-free register allocation, our algorithm's runtime is O (| G | ⋅ r 5 ⋅ r + 5 ) whereas the previous works had a runtime of O (| G | ⋅ r 16 ⋅ r ).

Finally, we provide extensive experimental results on spill-free register allocation, showcasing the scalability of our approach in comparison to previous state-of-the-art methods. Most notably, our approach can handle real-world instances with up to 20 registers, whereas previous works could only scale to 8. This is a significant improvement since most ubiquitous architectures, such as the x86 family, have 16 registers. For such architectures, our approach is the first-ever exact algorithm that scales up to solve the real-world instances of spill-free register allocation.
items.abstract_zh:
众所周知，结构化程序的控制流图（CFG）是稀疏的。这种稀疏性之前已以图参数（例如树宽和路径宽度）形式化，并用于为众多编译器优化、模型检查和程序分析任务设计更快的参数化算法。

在这项工作中，我们观察到已知的图稀疏性参数无法准确捕获 CFG 所表现出的稀疏性类型。例如，虽然所有结构化 CFG 的树宽最多为 7，但并非每个树宽为 7 或更小的图都可以实现为 CFG。因此，当前的参数化算法正在比 CFG 更通用的图族上解决底层图问题。

为了解决这个问题，我们基于一种语法设计了一种新的但自然的图分解概念，该语法精确地捕获了可以实现为程序 CFG 的图集。我们证明，我们的分解概念可以实现与基于树宽/路径宽度的方法中经常使用的相同类型的动态规划算法。作为两个具体应用，使用 CFG 的语法分解，我们为 Chaitin 定义的寄存器分配经典问题的两种变体提供了渐近更有效的算法，即将程序变量分配给有限数量的寄存器，使得具有相交生命周期的变量不会分配给同一寄存器。请注意，Chaitin 的寄存器分配公式不允许生存范围分割。我们的算法不仅与这些问题的非参数化解决方案相比渐近更快，而且与文献中最先进的基于树宽/路径宽度的方法相比也更快。对于固定数量寄存器上的最小成本寄存器分配，我们提供了一种运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 5 ⋅ r ) 的算法，其中 | G |是程序的大小，𝕈是程序变量的集合，r是寄存器的数量。相比之下，之前基于树宽的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ |𝕈| 16 ⋅ r )。对于无溢出寄存器分配的决策问题，我们的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ r 5 ⋅ r + 5 )，而之前的算法的运行时间为 O (| G | ⋅ r 16 ⋅ r )。

最后，我们提供了关于无溢出寄存器分配的广泛实验结果，展示了我们的方法与以前最先进的方法相比的可扩展性。最值得注意的是，我们的方法可以处理具有多达 20 个寄存器的实际实例，而以前的工作只能扩展到 8 个。这是一个重大改进，因为大多数普遍存在的架构（例如 x86 系列）都有 16 个寄存器。对于此类架构，我们的方法是第一个精确的算法，可以扩展以解决无溢出寄存器分配的现实世界实例。

items.title: SmoothE: Differentiable E-Graph Extraction.
items.abstract:
E-graphs have gained increasing popularity in compiler optimization, program synthesis, and theorem proving tasks. They enable compact representation of many equivalent expressions and facilitate transformations via rewrite rules without phase ordering limitations. A major benefit of using e-graphs is the ability to explore a large space of equivalent expressions, allowing the extraction of an expression that best meets certain optimization objectives (or cost models). However, current e-graph extraction methods often face unfavorable scalability-quality trade-offs and only support simple linear cost functions, limiting their applicability to more realistic optimization problems.

In this work, we propose SmoothE , a differentiable e-graph extraction algorithm designed to handle complex cost models and optimized for GPU acceleration. More specifically, we approach the e-graph extraction problem from a probabilistic perspective, where the original discrete optimization is relaxed to a continuous differentiable form. This formulation supports any differentiable cost functions and enables efficient searching for solutions using gradient descent. We implement SmoothE in PyTorch to leverage the advancements of the modern machine learning ecosystem. Additionally, we introduce performance optimization techniques to exploit sparsity and data parallelism. We evaluate SmoothE on a variety of realistic e-graphs from five different applications using three distinct cost models, including both linear and non-linear ones. Our experiments demonstrate that SmoothE consistently achieves a favorable trade-off between scalability and solution quality.
items.abstract_zh:
电子图在编译器优化、程序综合和定理证明任务中越来越受欢迎。它们支持许多等效表达式的紧凑表示，并通过重写规则促进转换，而没有相序限制。使用电子图的一个主要好处是能够探索大量等效表达式，从而提取最能满足某些优化目标（或成本模型）的表达式。然而，当前的电子图提取方法通常面临不利的可扩展性与质量权衡，并且仅支持简单的线性成本函数，限制了它们对更现实的优化问题的适用性。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 SmoothE，这是一种可微的电子图提取算法，旨在处理复杂的成本模型并针对 GPU 加速进行了优化。更具体地说，我们从概率角度处理电子图提取问题，其中原始离散优化被放松为连续可微形式。该公式支持任何可微的成本函数，并能够使用梯度下降有效搜索解决方案。我们在 PyTorch 中实现 SmoothE，以利用现代机器学习生态系统的进步。此外，我们引入了性能优化技术来利用稀疏性和数据并行性。我们使用三种不同的成本模型（包括线性和非线性模型）在来自五个不同应用程序的各种真实电子图上评估 SmoothE。我们的实验表明，SmoothE 始终在可扩展性和解决方案质量之间实现有利的权衡。

items.title: MoE-Lightning: High-Throughput MoE Inference on Memory-constrained GPUs.
items.abstract: Efficient deployment of large language models, particularly Mixture of Experts (MoE) models, on resource-constrained platforms presents significant challenges in terms of computational efficiency and memory utilization. The MoE architecture, renowned for its ability to increase model capacity without a proportional increase in inference cost, greatly reduces the token generation latency compared with dense models. However, the large model size makes MoE models inaccessible to individuals without high-end GPUs. In this paper, we propose a high-throughput MoE batch inference system, MoE-L ightning , that significantly outperforms past work. MoE-L ightning introduces a novel CPU-GPU-I/O pipelining schedule, CGOP ipe , with paged weights to achieve high resource utilization, and a performance model, HRM, based on a Hierarchical Roofline Model we introduce to help find policies with higher throughput than existing systems. MoE-L ightning can achieve up to (10.3x) higher throughput than state-of-the-art offloading-enabled LLM inference systems for Mixtral 8x7B on a single T4 GPU (16GB). When the theoretical system throughput is bounded by the GPU memory, MoE-L ightning can reach the throughput upper bound with 2-3x less CPU memory, significantly increasing resource utilization. MoE-L ightning also supports efficient batch inference for much larger MoEs (e.g., Mixtral 8x22B and DBRX) on multiple low-cost GPUs (e.g., 2--4 T4s).
items.abstract_zh: 在资源受限的平台上高效部署大型语言模型，特别是专家混合 (MoE) 模型，在计算效率和内存利用率方面提出了重大挑战。 MoE 架构以其在不成比例增加推理成本的情况下增加模型容量的能力而闻名，与密集模型相比，大大减少了令牌生成延迟。然而，较大的模型尺寸使得没有高端 GPU 的个人无法访问 MoE 模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种高吞吐量的 MoE 批量推理系统 MoE-Lightning，其性能显着优于过去的工作。 MoE-Lightning 引入了一种新颖的 CPU-GPU-I/O 流水线调度 CGOP ipe ，具有分页权重以实现高资源利用率，以及基于我们引入的分层 Roofline 模型的性能模型 HRM，以帮助找到比现有系统具有更高吞吐量的策略。对于单个 T4 GPU (16GB) 上的 Mixtral 8x7B，MoE-Lightning 的吞吐量比最先进的支持卸载的 LLM 推理系统高 (10.3 倍)。当理论系统吞吐量受GPU内存限制时，MoE-Lightning可以用少2-3倍的CPU内存达到吞吐量上限，从而显着提高资源利用率。 MoE-Lightning 还支持在多个低成本 GPU（例如 2--4 T4）上对更大的 MoE（例如 Mixtral 8x22B 和 DBRX）进行高效批量推理。

items.title: Instruction-Aware Cooperative TLB and Cache Replacement Policies.
items.abstract:
Modern server and data center applications are characterized not only by big datasets, but also by large instruction footprints that incur frequent cache and Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB) misses due to instruction accesses. Instruction TLB misses are particularly problematic since they cause pipeline stalls that significantly harm performance.

This paper proposes cooperative last-level TLB (STLB) and L2 cache (L2C) replacement policies targeting workloads with large instruction footprints. We propose the Instruction Translation Prioritization (iTP) , an STLB replacement policy that maximizes the number of instruction hits in the STLB at the expense of increasing data page walks. To compensate for the increase of data page walks, we propose the extended Page Table Prioritization (xPTP) , a new L2C replacement policy that amplifies the benefits of iTP by effectively reducing L2C misses due to data page walks. Our proposal, iTP + xPTP , combines iTP at STLB and xPTP at L2C. In addition, iTP + xPTP employs an adaptive mechanism that switches between xPTP and LRU policies at L2C based on the pressure placed on the virtual memory subsystem. Our proposal improves single-core geometric mean performance by 18.9% over a baseline that uses the LRU replacement policy at both STLB and L2C across a set of contemporary server workloads. Under SMT co-location, the corresponding performance uplift is 11.4%. Finally, we show that our proposal outperforms the state-of-the-art STLB and cache replacement policies.
items.abstract_zh:
现代服务器和数据中心应用程序的特点不仅是大数据集，而且还具有大量指令占用空间，这些指令占用空间会因指令访问而导致频繁的缓存和转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 丢失。指令 TLB 未命中尤其成问题，因为它们会导致管道停顿，从而严重损害性能。

本文提出了针对具有大指令占用空间的工作负载的协作末级 TLB (STLB) 和 L2 缓存 (L2C) 替换策略。我们提出了指令翻译优先级（iTP），这是一种 STLB 替换策略，它以增加数据页遍历为代价来最大化 STLB 中的指令命中数量。为了补偿数据页遍历的增加，我们提出了扩展页表优先级（xPTP），这是一种新的 L2C 替换策略，通过有效减少数据页遍历导致的 L2C 缺失来放大 iTP 的优势。我们的建议 iTP + xPTP 结合了 STLB 的 iTP 和 L2C 的 xPTP。此外，iTP+xPTP采用自适应机制，根据虚拟内存子系统的压力在L2C上在xPTP和LRU策略之间切换。与在一组当代服务器工作负载中在 STLB 和 L2C 上使用 LRU 替换策略的基准相比，我们的建议将单核几何平均性能提高了 18.9%。在SMT主机托管下，相应的性能提升为11.4%。最后，我们表明我们的建议优于最先进的 STLB 和缓存替换策略。

items.title: Concerto: Automatic Communication Optimization and Scheduling for Large-Scale Deep Learning.
items.abstract: With the exponential growth of deep learning (DL), there arises an escalating need for scalability. Despite significant advancements in communication hardware capabilities, the time consumed by communication remains a bottleneck during training. The existing various optimizations are coupled within parallel systems to implement specific computation-communication overlap. These approaches pose challenges in terms of performance, programmability, and generality. In this paper, we introduce Concerto, a compiler framework designed to address these challenges by automatically optimizing and scheduling communication. We formulate the scheduling problem as a resource-constrained project scheduling problem and use off-the-shelf solver to get the near-optimal scheduling. And use auto-decomposition to create overlap opportunity for critical (synchronous) communication. Our evaluation shows Concerto can match or outperform state-of-the-art parallel frameworks, including Megatron-LM, JAX/XLA, DeepSpeed, and Alpa, all of which include extensive hand-crafted optimization. Unlike previous works, Concerto decouples the parallel approach and communication optimization, then can generalize to a wide variety of parallelisms without manual optimization.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习 (DL) 的指数级增长，对可扩展性的需求不断升级。尽管通信硬件能力取得了显着进步，但通信消耗的时间仍然是训练过程中的瓶颈。现有的各种优化在并行系统内耦合以实现特定的计算通信重叠。这些方法在性能、可编程性和通用性方面提出了挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 Concerto，这是一个编译器框架，旨在通过自动优化和调度通信来解决这些挑战。我们将调度问题表述为资源受限的项目调度问题，并使用现成的求解器来获得接近最优的调度。并使用自动分解为关键（同步）通信创造重叠机会。我们的评估表明 Concerto 可以匹配或超越最先进的并行框架，包括 Megatron-LM、JAX/XLA、DeepSpeed 和 Alpa，所有这些框架都包含广泛的手工优化。与之前的作品不同，Concerto 将并行方法和通信优化解耦，然后可以推广到各种并行性，而无需手动优化。

items.title: HALO: Loop-aware Bootstrapping Management for Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
items.abstract:
Thanks to the computation ability on encrypted data, fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) is an attractive solution for privacy-preserving computation. Despite its advantages, FHE suffers from limited applicability in small programs because repeated FHE multiplications deplete the level of a ciphertext, which is finite. Bootstrapping reinitializes the level, thus allowing support for larger programs. However, its high computational overhead and the risk of level underflow require sophisticated bootstrapping placement, thereby increasing the programming burden. Although a recently proposed compiler automatizes the bootstrapping placement, its applicability is still limited due to lack of loop support.

This work proposes the first loop-aware bootstrapping management compiler, called HALO, which optimizes bootstrapping placement in an FHE program with a loop. To correctly support bootstrapping-enabled loops, HALO matches encryption types and levels between live-in and loop-carried ciphertexts in the loops. To reduce the bootstrapping overheads, HALO decreases the number of bootstrapping within a loop body by packing the loop-carried variables to a single ciphertext, reduces wasted levels in a short loop body by unrolling the loop, and optimizes the bootstrapping latency by adjusting the target level of bootstrapping as needed. For seven machine learning programs with flat and nested loops, HALO shows 27% performance speedup compared to the state-of-the-art compiler that places bootstrapping operations on fully unrolled loops. In addition, HALO reduces the compilation time and code size by geometric means of 209.12x and 11.0x compared to the compiler, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
由于对加密数据的计算能力，完全同态加密（FHE）是隐私保护计算的一种有吸引力的解决方案。尽管 FHE 有其优点，但它在小型程序中的适用性有限，因为重复的 FHE 乘法会耗尽密文的级别，而密文的级别是有限的。引导重新初始化级别，从而允许支持更大的程序。然而，其高计算开销和电平下溢的风险需要复杂的自举放置，从而增加了编程负担。尽管最近提出的编译器可以自动化引导放置，但由于缺乏循环支持，其适用性仍然受到限制。

这项工作提出了第一个循环感知引导管理编译器，称为 HALO，它优化了带有循环的 FHE 程序中的引导放置。为了正确支持启用引导的循环，HALO 会匹配循环中的实时密文和循环携带的密文之间的加密类型和级别。为了减少引导开销，HALO 通过将循环携带的变量打包到单个密文中来减少循环体内的引导次数，通过展开循环来减少短循环体内浪费的级别，并通过根据需要调整引导的目标级别来优化引导延迟。对于七个具有平面和嵌套循环的机器学习程序，与将引导操作置于完全展开的循环上的最先进的编译器相比，HALO 显示出 27% 的性能加速。此外，与编译器相比，HALO 的编译时间和代码大小分别减少了 209.12 倍和 11.0 倍的几何平均值。

items.title: AnA: An Attentive Autonomous Driving System.
items.abstract: In an autonomous driving system (ADS), the perception module is crucial to driving safety and efficiency. Unfortunately, the perception in today's ADS remains oblivious to driving decisions, contrasting to how humans drive. Our idea is to refactor ADS so that (1) the ADS guides its perception with the driving knowledge in situ; (2) the perception differentiates between awareness and attention. We propose a system called AnA with three novel mechanisms: (1) a query interface for the planning to express its interest in perception; (2) a query executor that maps queries to an optimal set of perception tasks; (3) a monitor for handling abnormal task executions with driving knowledge. On challenging driving benchmarks, AnA outperforms competitive baselines: it responds to adversarial events timely, reducing collisions by 2x; it reduces compute usage by 44% without compromising driving safety. We attribute AnA's efficacy to its attentive driving, a human-like behavior that improves resource proportionality.
items.abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶系统（ADS）中，感知模块对于驾驶安全和效率至关重要。不幸的是，与人类的驾驶方式相比，当今 ADS 的感知仍然忽视了驾驶决策。我们的想法是重构ADS，使得（1）ADS用现场的驾驶知识来指导其感知； (2)知觉区分意识和注意。我们提出了一个名为 AnA 的系统，它具有三种新颖的机制：（1）一个查询接口，用于规划表达其对感知的兴趣； (2) 查询执行器，将查询映射到一组最佳感知任务； (3)利用驾驶知识处理异常任务执行的监视器。在具有挑战性的驾驶基准中，AnA 的表现优于竞争基准：它能及时响应对抗事件，将碰撞减少 2 倍；它可以在不影响驾驶安全的情况下减少 44% 的计算使用量。我们将 AnA 的功效归因于它的专注驾驶，这是一种提高资源比例的类人行为。

items.title: H-Houdini: Scalable Invariant Learning.
items.abstract:
Formal verification is a critical task in hardware design today. Yet, while there has been significant progress in improving technique automation and efficiency, scaling to large hardware designs remains a significant challenge.

We address this challenge by proposing H-H OUDINI : a new algorithm for (mostly) push-button inductive invariant learning that scales to large hardware designs. H-H OUDINI combines the strengths of Machine Learning Inspired Synthesis (MLIS) and SAT-based Incremental Learning. The key advance is a method that replaces the monolithic SMT-style checks made by MLIS with a carefully-constructed hierarchy of smaller, incremental SMT checks that can be parallelized, memoized and reassembled into the original 'monolithic' invariant in a correct-by-construction fashion.

We instantiate H-H OUDINI as V eloCT , a framework that proves hardware security properties by learning relational invariants. We benchmark V eloCT on the 'safe instruction set synthesis' problem in microarchitectural security. Here, V eloCT automatically (with no expert annotations) learns an invariant for the RISC-V Rocketchip in under 10s (2880x faster than state of the art). Further, V eloCT is the first work to scale to the RISC-V out-of-order BOOM and can (mostly-automatically) verify all BOOM variants (ranging from Small to Mega) in between 6.95 minutes to 199.1 minutes.
items.abstract_zh:
形式验证是当今硬件设计中的一项关键任务。然而，尽管在提高技术自动化和效率方面取得了重大进展，但扩展到大型硬件设计仍然是一个重大挑战。

我们通过提出 H-H OUDINI 来应对这一挑战：一种用于（主要是）按钮归纳不变学习的新算法，可扩展到大型硬件设计。 H-H OUDINI 结合了机器学习启发综合 (MLIS) 和基于 SAT 的增量学习的优势。关键的进步是一种方法，该方法用精心构建的较小的增量 SMT 检查层次结构取代了 MLIS 进行的整体式 SMT 式检查，这些检查可以并行化、记忆并以构造正确的方式重新组装成原始的“整体式”不变量。

我们将 H-H OUDINI 实例化为 V eloCT，这是一个通过学习关系不变量来证明硬件安全属性的框架。我们针对微架构安全中的“安全指令集合成”问题对 V eloCT 进行基准测试。在这里，V eloCT 在 10 秒内自动（无需专家注释）学习 RISC-V Rocketchip 的不变量（比现有技术快 2880 倍）。此外，V eloCT 是第一个扩展到 RISC-V 无序 BOOM 的工作，并且可以（主要是自动）在 6.95 分钟到 199.1 分钟之间验证所有 BOOM 变体（范围从小型到巨型）。

items.title: Earth+: On-Board Satellite Imagery Compression Leveraging Historical Earth Observations.
items.abstract: Due to limited downlink (satellite-to-ground) capacity, over 90% of the images captured by the earth-observation satellites are not downloaded to the ground. To overcome the downlink limitation, we present Earth+, a new on-board satellite imagery compression system that identifies and downloads only changed areas in each image compared to latest on-board reference images of the same location. The key of Earth+ is that it obtains latest on-board reference images by letting the ground stations upload images recently captured by all satellites in the constellation. To our best knowledge, Earth+ is the first system that leverages images across an entire satellite constellation to enable more images to be downloaded to the ground (by better satellite imagery compression). Our evaluation shows that to download images of the same area, Earth+ can reduce the downlink usage by 3.3× compared to state-of-the-art on-board image compression techniques without sacrificing imagery quality or using more resources (downlink, computation or storage).
items.abstract_zh: 由于下行（星地）能力有限，对地观测卫星捕获的图像90%以上没有下载到地面。为了克服下行链路限制，我们推出了 Earth+，这是一种新的机载卫星图像压缩系统，可识别并下载每张图像中与同一位置的最新机载参考图像相比发生变化的区域。 Earth+的关键在于，它通过让地面站上传星座内所有卫星最近拍摄的图像来获取最新的星上参考图像。据我们所知，Earth+ 是第一个利用整个卫星星座的图像来将更多图像下载到地面的系统（通过更好的卫星图像压缩）。我们的评估表明，与最先进的机载图像压缩技术相比，下载同一区域的图像时，Earth+ 可以将下行链路使用量减少 3.3 倍，而不会牺牲图像质量或使用更多资源（下行链路、计算或存储）。

items.title: ARC: Warp-level Adaptive Atomic Reduction in GPUs to Accelerate Differentiable Rendering.
items.abstract:
Differentiable rendering is widely used in emerging applications that represent any 3D scene as a model trained using gradient descent from 2D images. Recent works (e.g., 3D Gaussian Splatting) use rasterization to enable rendering photo-realistic imagery at high speeds from these learned 3D models. These rasterization-based differentiable rendering methods have been demonstrated to be very promising, providing state-of-art quality for various important tasks. However, training a model to represent a scene is still time-consuming even on powerful GPUs. In this work, we observe that the gradient computation step during model training is a significant bottleneck due to the large number of atomic operations . These atomics overwhelm the atomic units in the L2 cache of GPUs, causing long stalls.

To address this, we leverage the observations that during gradient computation: (1) for most warps, all threads atomically update the same memory locations; and (2) warps generate varying amount of atomic traffic. We propose ARC, a primitive that accelerates atomic operations based on two key ideas: First, we enable warp-level reduction at the GPU cores using registers to leverage the locality in intra-warp atomic updates. Second, we distribute atomic computation between the cores and the L2 atomic units to increase the throughput of atomic computation. We propose two implementations of ARC: ARC-HW, a hardware-based approach and ARC-SW, a software-only approach. We demonstrate significant speedups with ARC of 2.6× on average (up to 5.7×) for widely used differentiable rendering workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
可微分渲染广泛应用于新兴应用程序中，这些应用程序将任何 3D 场景表示为使用 2D 图像梯度下降训练的模型。最近的工作（例如 3D 高斯泼溅）使用光栅化来从这些学习的 3D 模型中高速渲染照片般逼真的图像。这些基于光栅化的可微分渲染方法已被证明非常有前途，可为各种重要任务提供最先进的质量。然而，即使在强大的 GPU 上，训练模型来表示场景仍然非常耗时。在这项工作中，我们观察到，由于大量的原子操作，模型训练期间的梯度计算步骤是一个重要的瓶颈。这些原子压倒了 GPU 二级缓存中的原子单元，导致长时间停顿。

为了解决这个问题，我们利用梯度计算期间的观察结果：（1）对于大多数扭曲，所有线程自动更新相同的内存位置； (2) 扭曲产生不同数量的原子流量。我们提出了 ARC，这是一种基于两个关键思想加速原子操作的原语：首先，我们使用寄存器在 GPU 核心上实现扭曲级别减少，以利用扭曲内原子更新的局部性。其次，我们在核心和 L2 原子单元之间分配原子计算，以提高原子计算的吞吐量。我们提出了两种 ARC 实现：ARC-HW（基于硬件的方法）和 ARC-SW（纯软件方法）。对于广泛使用的可微渲染工作负载，我们展示了平均 2.6 倍（高达 5.7 倍）的 ARC 显着加速。

items.title: Robustness Verification for Checking Crash Consistency of Non-volatile Memory.
items.abstract: The emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies provide competitive performance with DRAM and ensure data persistence in the event of system failure. However, it exhibits weak behaviour in terms of the order in which stores are committed to NVMs, and therefore requires extra efforts from developers to flush pending writes. To ensure correctness of this error-prone task, it is crucial to develop a rigid method to check crash consistency of programs running on NVM devices. Most existing solutions are testing-based and rely on user guidance to dynamically detect such deficiencies. In this paper, we present a fully automated method to verify robustness, a newly established property for ensuring crash consistency of such programs. The method is based on the observation that, reachability of a post-crash non-volatile state under a given pre-crash execution can be reduced to validity of the pre-crash execution with additional ordering constraints. Our robustness verification algorithm employs a search-based framework to explore all partial executions and states, and checks if any non-volatile state is reachable under certain pre-crash execution. Once a reachable non-volatile state is obtained, we further check its reachability under memory consistency model. The algorithm is implemented in a prototype tool PMVerify that leverages symbolic encoding of the program and utilizes an SMT solver to efficiently explore all executions and states. The method is integrated into the DPLL(T) framework to optimize the robustness checking algorithm. Experiments on the PMDK example benchmark show that PMVerify is competitive with the state-of-the-art dynamic tool, PSan , in terms of robustness violation detection.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术可提供与 DRAM 竞争的性能，并确保在系统发生故障时数据的持久性。然而，它在存储提交给 NVM 的顺序方面表现出较弱的行为，因此需要开发人员付出额外的努力来刷新挂起的写入。为了确保这项容易出错的任务的正确性，开发一种严格的方法来检查在 NVM 设备上运行的程序的崩溃一致性至关重要。大多数现有解决方案都是基于测试的，并依靠用户指导来动态检测此类缺陷。在本文中，我们提出了一种完全自动化的方法来验证鲁棒性，这是一种新建立的属性，用于确保此类程序的崩溃一致性。该方法基于这样的观察：在给定的崩溃前执行下崩溃后非易失性状态的可达性可以通过额外的排序约束被降低到崩溃前执行的有效性。我们的稳健性验证算法采用基于搜索的框架来探索所有部分执行和状态，并检查在某些预崩溃执行下是否可以达到任何非易失性状态。一旦获得可到达的非易失性状态，我们进一步检查其在内存一致性模型下的可达性。该算法在原型工具 PMVerify 中实现，该工具利用程序的符号编码并利用 SMT 求解器来有效地探索所有执行和状态。该方法被集成到DPLL(T)框架中以优化鲁棒性检查算法。 PMDK 示例基准测试表明，PMVerify 在鲁棒性违规检测方面与最先进的动态工具 PSan 具有竞争力。

items.title: Nazar: Monitoring and Adapting ML Models on Mobile Devices.
items.abstract: ML models are increasingly run locally on mobile devices for low-latency inference and offline operation. However, it is hard for ML operators to track on-device model accuracy, which can degrade unpredictably (e.g. due to local data drift). We design Nazar, the first end-to-end system for continuously monitoring and adapting models on mobile devices without requiring feedback from users. Our key observation is that accuracy degradation is often due to a specific root cause, which may affect a large group of devices. Once Nazar detects a degradation affecting a large number of devices, it automatically pinpoints the root causes and adapts the model specifically to them. Evaluation on two computer vision datasets shows that Nazar consistently boosts accuracy compared to existing approaches by up to 19.4%.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型越来越多地在移动设备上本地运行，以实现低延迟推理和离线操作。然而，机器学习操作员很难跟踪设备上模型的准确性，这可能会不可预测地降低（例如由于本地数据漂移）。我们设计了 Nazar，这是第一个端到端系统，用于在移动设备上持续监控和调整模型，而不需要用户的反馈。我们的主要观察结果是，精度下降通常是由于特定的根本原因造成的，这可能会影响大量设备。一旦 Nazar 检测到影响大量设备的性能下降，它就会自动查明根本原因，并专门针对这些设备调整模型。对两个计算机视觉数据集的评估表明，与现有方法相比，Nazar 的准确性始终提高了 19.4%。

items.title: Exo 2: Growing a Scheduling Language.
items.abstract: User-schedulable languages (USLs) help programmers productively optimize programs by providing safe means of transforming them. Current USLs are designed to give programmers exactly the control they want, while automating all other concerns. However, there is no universal answer for what performance-conscious programmers want to control, how they want to control it, and what they want to automate, even in relatively narrow domains. We claim that USLs should, instead, be designed to grow. We present Exo 2, a scheduling language that enables users to define new scheduling operations externally to the compiler. By composing a set of trusted, fine-grained primitives, users can safely write their own scheduling library to build up desired automation. We identify actions (ways of modifying code), inspection (ways of interrogating code), and references (ways of pointing to code) as essential for any user-extensible USL. We fuse these ideas into a new mechanism called Cursors that enables the creation of scheduling libraries in user code. We demonstrate libraries that amortize scheduling effort across more than 80 high-performance kernels, reducing total scheduling code by an order of magnitude and delivering performance competitive with state-of-the-art implementations on three different platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 用户可调度语言 (USL) 通过提供安全的转换方法来帮助程序员高效地优化程序。当前的 USL 旨在为程序员提供他们想要的控制，同时自动化所有其他问题。然而，对于注重性能的程序员想要控制什么、如何控制以及想要自动化什么，即使在相对狭窄的领域中，也没有通用的答案。我们认为，USL 的设计应该是为了增长。我们推出了 Exo 2，一种调度语言，使用户能够在编译器外部定义新的调度操作。通过编写一组可信的、细粒度的原语，用户可以安全地编写自己的调度库来构建所需的自动化。我们认为操作（修改代码的方式）、检查（询问代码的方式）和引用（指向代码的方式）对于任何用户可扩展的 USL 都是必不可少的。我们将这些想法融合到一种称为游标的新机制中，该机制可以在用户代码中创建调度库。我们演示了可以在 80 多个高性能内核中分摊调度工作的库，将总调度代码减少一个数量级，并提供与三个不同平台上最先进的实现相媲美的性能。

items.title: RASSM: Residue-based Acceleration of Single Sparse Matrix Computation via Adaptive Tiling.
items.abstract:
Single-Sparse-Matrix Kernels (SSMKs) such as SpMM, SDDMM, SpMV, and SpTS form the backbone of applications such as data analytics, graph processing, finite-element analysis, machine learning (including GNNs and LLMs), etc. This paper introduces Residue-based Acceleration of Single Sparse Matrix Computation via Adaptive Tiling (RASSM), an input-dependent, adaptive 2-dimensional tiling technique for SSMKs. The adaptation leverages the concept of a residue matrix : a data structure that compactly captures the pattern of non-zeros in the sparse matrix. With residues, we show it is possible to make intelligent decisions on adaptive tile sizes, resulting in increased cache occupancy. Residues allow for optimizations across both spatial and temporal locality.

RASSM improves data movement and overall performance as compared to prior techniques. For example, using spatial analysis for SpMM on commodity server CPUs, RASSM has 1.30X speedup over MKL, 1.32X over J-Stream, 1.20X over ASpT, 1.11X over CSF-4 uniform-shape, and 1.10X over CSF-4 uniform-occupancy. RASSM with temporal analysis improves this to 1.36X (vs. MKL), 1.38X (vs. J-Stream), 1.26X (vs. ASpT), 1.17X (vs. CSF-4 uniform-shape), and 1.16X (vs. CSF-4 uniform-occupancy).
items.abstract_zh:
SpMM、SDDMM、SpMV 和 SpTS 等单稀疏矩阵内核 (SSMK) 构成了数据分析、图形处理、有限元分析、机器学习（包括 GNN 和 LLM）等应用的支柱。本文介绍了通过自适应平铺进行单稀疏矩阵计算的残基加速 (RASSM)，这是一种用于 SSMK 的依赖于输入的自适应二维平铺技术。该适应利用了残差矩阵的概念：一种紧凑地捕获稀疏矩阵中非零模式的数据结构。通过残差，我们表明可以对自适应切片大小做出智能决策，从而增加缓存占用率。残差允许跨空间和时间局部性进行优化。

与现有技术相比，RASSM 改进了数据移动和整体性能。例如，在商用服务器 CPU 上使用 SpMM 空间分析，RASSM 的加速比 MKL 快 1.30 倍，比 J-Stream 快 1.32 倍，比 ASpT 快 1.20 倍，比 CSF-4 均匀形状快 1.11 倍，比 CSF-4 均匀占用快 1.10 倍。具有时间分析功能的 RASSM 将其提高至 1.36X（与 MKL 相比）、1.38X（与 J-Stream 相比）、1.26X（与 ASpT 相比）、1.17X（与 CSF-4 均匀形状相比）和 1.16X（与 CSF-4 均匀占用相比）。

items.title: Cinnamon: A Framework for Scale-Out Encrypted AI.
items.abstract: Fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) is a promising cryptographic solution that enables computation on encrypted data, but its adoption remains a challenge due to steep performance overheads. Although recent FHE architectures have made valiant efforts to narrow the performance gap, they not only have massive monolithic chip designs but also only target small ML workloads. We present Cinnamon, a framework for accelerating state-of-the-art ML workloads that are encrypted using FHE. Cinnamon accelerates encrypted computing by exploiting parallelism at all levels of a program, using novel algorithms, compilers, and hardware techniques to create a scale-out design for FHE as opposed to a monolithic chip design. Our evaluation of the Cinnamon framework on small programs shows a 2.3× improvement in performance compared to prior state-of-the-art designs. Further, we use Cinnamon to show for the first time the scalability of large ML models such as the BERT language model in FHE. Cinnamon achieves a speedup of 36,600× compared to a CPU bringing down the inference time from 17 hours to 1.67 seconds thereby enabling new opportunities for privacy-preserving machine learning. Finally, Cinnamon's parallelization strategies and architectural extensions reduce the required resources per-chip leading to a 5× and 2.68× improvement in performance-per-dollar compared to state-of-the-art monolithic and chiplet architectures respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 完全同态加密 (FHE) 是一种很有前途的加密解决方案，可以对加密数据进行计算，但由于性能开销巨大，其采用仍然是一个挑战。尽管最近的 FHE 架构为缩小性能差距做出了巨大的努力，但它们不仅具有大规模的单片芯片设计，而且仅针对小型 ML 工作负载。我们推出了 Cinnamon，这是一个用于加速使用 FHE 加密的最先进的 ML 工作负载的框架。 Cinnamon 通过利用程序各个级别的并行性、使用新颖的算法、编译器和硬件技术来为 FHE 创建横向扩展设计（而不是单片芯片设计），从而加速加密计算。我们对小程序上的 Cinnamon 框架的评估表明，与之前最先进的设计相比，性能提高了 2.3 倍。此外，我们使用 Cinnamon 首次展示了大型 ML 模型（例如 FHE 中的 BERT 语言模型）的可扩展性。与 CPU 相比，Cinnamon 实现了 36,600 倍的加速，将推理时间从 17 小时缩短至 1.67 秒，从而为保护隐私的机器学习带来了新的机会。最后，Cinnamon 的并行化策略和架构扩展减少了每个芯片所需的资源，与最先进的单片架构和小芯片架构相比，每美元性能分别提高了 5 倍和 2.68 倍。

items.title: GraphPipe: Improving Performance and Scalability of DNN Training with Graph Pipeline Parallelism.
items.abstract:
Deep neural networks (DNNs) continue to grow rapidly in size, making them infeasible to train on a single device (e.g. GPU). Pipeline parallelism is commonly used in existing DNN systems to support large-scale DNN training by partitioning a DNN into multiple stages, which concurrently perform DNN computation for different micro-batches of training samples in a pipeline fashion. However, existing pipeline-parallel approaches only consider sequential pipeline stages and thus ignore the topology of a DNN, resulting in missed model-parallel opportunities.

This paper presents graph pipeline parallelism (GPP), a new pipeline-parallel scheme that partitions a DNN into pipeline stages whose dependencies are identified by a directed acyclic graph. GPP generalizes existing sequential pipeline parallelism and preserves the inherent topology of a DNN to enable concurrent execution of computationally-independent operators, resulting in reduced memory requirement and improved GPU performance. In addition, we develop GraphPipe , a distributed system that exploits GPP strategies to enable performant and scalable DNN training. GraphPipe partitions a DNN into a graph of stages, optimizes micro-batch schedules for these stages, and parallelizes DNN training using the discovered GPP strategies. Evaluation on a variety of DNNs shows that GraphPipe outperforms existing pipeline-parallel systems such as PipeDream and Piper by up to 1.6×. GraphPipe also reduces the search time by 9-21× compared to PipeDream and Piper.
items.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 的规模持续快速增长，使得它们无法在单个设备（例如 GPU）上进行训练。现有的 DNN 系统通常使用管道并行性，通过将 DNN 划分为多个阶段来支持大规模 DNN 训练，这些阶段以管道方式同时对不同微批次的训练样本执行 DNN 计算。然而，现有的管道并行方法仅考虑顺序管道阶段，因此忽略了 DNN 的拓扑，导致错过了模型并行的机会。

本文提出了图管道并行（GPP），这是一种新的管道并行方案，它将 DNN 划分为管道阶段，其依赖关系由有向无环图识别。 GPP 概括了现有的顺序管道并行性，并保留了 DNN 的固有拓扑，以实现计算独立运算符的并发执行，从而减少内存需求并提高 GPU 性能。此外，我们还开发了 GraphPipe，这是一个分布式系统，利用 GPP 策略来实现高性能和可扩展的 DNN 训练。 GraphPipe 将 DNN 划分为阶段图，优化这些阶段的微批量调度，并使用发现的 GPP 策略并行化 DNN 训练。对各种 DNN 的评估表明，GraphPipe 的性能比 PipeDream 和 Piper 等现有管道并行系统高出 1.6 倍。与 PipeDream 和 Piper 相比，GraphPipe 还减少了 9-21 倍的搜索时间。

items.title: Accelerating Number Theoretic Transform with Multi-GPU Systems for Efficient Zero Knowledge Proof.
items.abstract:
Zero-knowledge proofs validate statements without revealing any information, pivotal for applications such as verifiable outsourcing and digital currencies. However, their broad adoption is limited by the prolonged proof generation times, mainly due to two operations: Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) and Number Theoretic Transform (NTT). While MSM has been efficiently accelerated using multi-GPU systems, NTT has not, due to the high inter-GPU communication overhead incurred by its permutation data access pattern.

This paper identifies the necessity of multi-GPU NTT support for end-to-end proof generation. It introduces UniNTT, an NTT algorithm tailored for multi-GPU systems. The data access pattern of NTT incurs communication across all levels of the multi-GPU hierarchy (i.e., warp, thread block, GPU, and multi-GPU), complicating the implementation of multi-GPU NTT. To this end, UniNTT proposes a novel, overhead-free decomposition approach that recursively decomposes an NTT into smaller NTTs, enabling all hierarchy levels execute the same NTT computations at different scales. It promotes a uniform design of NTT optimizations based on an abstract hardware model, which are then tailored and applied to different levels of the hierarchy. UniNTT not only simplifies the optimization process but also shows that optimizations typically specific to one level can also be effectively generalized to others. Experiments show that UniNTT achieves an average 4.26× speedup compared to leading NTT implementations when both are executed on an 8-GPU system.
items.abstract_zh:
零知识证明可以在不泄露任何信息的情况下验证陈述，这对于可验证外包和数字货币等应用至关重要。然而，它们的广泛采用受到证明生成时间延长的限制，这主要是由于两种运算：多标量乘法（MSM）和数论变换（NTT）。虽然 MSM 已使用多 GPU 系统进行了有效加速，但 NTT 却没有，因为其排列数据访问模式会产生较高的 GPU 间通信开销。

本文指出了多 GPU NTT 支持端到端证明生成的必要性。它引入了 UniNTT，这是一种专为多 GPU 系统量身定制的 NTT 算法。 NTT 的数据访问模式需要跨多 GPU 层次结构的所有级别（即扭曲、线程块、GPU 和多 GPU）进行通信，从而使多 GPU NTT 的实现变得复杂。为此，UniNTT 提出了一种新颖的、无开销的分解方法，该方法将 NTT 递归地分解为更小的 NTT，使所有层次结构级别能够在不同的规模上执行相同的 NTT 计算。它促进基于抽象硬件模型的 NTT 优化的统一设计，然后将其定制并应用于层次结构的不同级别。 UniNTT 不仅简化了优化过程，还表明通常特定于某一级别的优化也可以有效地推广到其他级别。实验表明，当在 8-GPU 系统上执行时，与领先的 NTT 实现相比，UniNTT 平均实现了 4.26 倍的加速。

items.title: SuperNoVA: Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design for Resource-Aware SLAM.
items.abstract: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) plays a crucial role in robotics, autonomous systems, and augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) applications by enabling devices to understand and map unknown environments. However, deploying SLAM in AR/VR applications poses significant challenges, including the demand for high accuracy, real-time processing, and efficient resource utilization, especially on compact and lightweight devices. To address these challenges, we propose SuperNoVA, which enables high-accuracy, real-time, large-scale SLAM in resource-constrained settings through a full-stack system, spanning from algorithm to hardware. In particular, SuperNoVA dynamically constructs a subgraph to meet the latency target while preserving accuracy, virtualizes hardware resources for efficient graph processing, and implements a novel hardware architecture to accelerate the SLAM backend efficiently. Evaluation results demonstrate that, for a large-scale AR dataset, SuperNoVA reduces full SLAM backend computation latency by 89.5% compared to the baseline out-of-order CPU and 78.6% compared to the baseline embedded GPU, and reduces the maximum pose error by 89% over existing SLAM solutions, while always meeting the latency target.
items.abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 使设备能够理解和绘制未知环境，从而在机器人、自主系统以及增强现实和虚拟现实 (AR/VR) 应用中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，在 AR/VR 应用中部署 SLAM 带来了重大挑战，包括对高精度、实时处理和高效资源利用的需求，特别是在紧凑和轻量级设备上。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了SuperNoVA，它通过从算法到硬件的全栈系统，在资源受限的环境中实现高精度、实时、大规模的SLAM。特别是，SuperNoVA 动态构建子图以满足延迟目标，同时保持准确性，虚拟化硬件资源以实现高效的图处理，并实现新颖的硬件架构以有效加速 SLAM 后端。评估结果表明，对于大规模 AR 数据集，SuperNoVA 与基准乱序 CPU 相比，完整 SLAM 后端计算延迟降低了 89.5%，与基准嵌入式 GPU 相比降低了 78.6%，并且比现有 SLAM 解决方案将最大姿态误差降低了 89%，同时始终满足延迟目标。

items.title: ZRAID: Leveraging Zone Random Write Area (ZRWA) for Alleviating Partial Parity Tax in ZNS RAID.
items.abstract:
The Zoned Namespace (ZNS) SSD is an innovative technology that aims to mitigate the block interface tax associated with conventional SSDs. However, constructing a RAID system using ZNS SSDs presents a significant challenge in managing partial parity for incomplete stripes. Previous research permanently logs partial parity in a limited number of reserved zones, which not only creates bottlenecks in throughput but also exacerbates write amplification, thereby reducing the device's lifetime. We refer to these inefficiencies as the partial parity tax.

In this paper, we present ZRAID, a software ZNS RAID layer that leverages the newly added Zone Random Write Area (ZRWA) feature in the ZNS Command Set, to alleviate partial parity tax. ZRWA enables in-place updates within a confined area near the write pointer. ZRAID temporarily stores partial parity within the ZRWA of data zones. Thus, partial parity writes are distributed across multiple data zones, effectively eliminating throughput bottlenecks. Furthermore, any expired partial parity in the ZRWA is overwritten by subsequent data, avoiding unnecessary flash writes. With the introduction of ZRWA, ZRAID can leverage general schedulers, overcoming the queue depth limitations of ZNS-compatible schedulers. Our evaluation with actual ZNS SSDs demonstrates a significant improvement in write throughput: up to 34.7% in the fio microbenchmark, and an average of 14.5% in db_bench on RocksDB, along with up to a 1.6x reduction in flash write amplification.
items.abstract_zh:
分区命名空间 (ZNS) SSD 是一项创新技术，旨在减轻与传统 SSD 相关的块接口税。然而，使用 ZNS SSD 构建 RAID 系统在管理不完整条带的部分奇偶校验方面提出了重大挑战。先前的研究将部分奇偶校验永久记录在有限数量的保留区域中，这不仅会造成吞吐量瓶颈，还会加剧写入放大，从而缩短设备的使用寿命。我们将这些低效率称为部分平价税。

在本文中，我们提出了 ZRAID，这是一种软件 ZNS RAID 层，它利用 ZNS 命令集中新添加的区域随机写入区域 (ZRWA) 功能来减轻部分奇偶校验税。 ZRWA 支持在写指针附近的有限区域内进行就地更新。 ZRAID 临时存储数据区域 ZRWA 内的部分奇偶校验。因此，部分奇偶校验写入分布在多个数据区域，有效消除吞吐量瓶颈。此外，ZRWA 中任何过期的部分奇偶校验都会被后续数据覆盖，从而避免不必要的闪存写入。随着 ZRWA 的引入，ZRAID 可以利用通用调度程序，克服 ZNS 兼容调度程序的队列深度限制。我们对实际 ZNS SSD 的评估表明写入吞吐量显着提高：fio 微基准测试中高达 34.7%，RocksDB 上的 db_bench 平均提高 14.5%，闪存写入放大降低高达 1.6 倍。

items.title: RANGE-BLOCKS: A Synchronization Facility for Domain-Specific Architectures.
items.abstract: Current domain-specific architectures (DSAs) work predominantly with static data structures and find it challenging to insert or remove data (they only support in-place updates). However, as DSAs target real-world applications, it is neces- sary to support mutable and dynamically resizable data structures. DSAs cannot support dynamic data structures since they lack a synchronization facility. DSAs are forced to either use address-based atomics or batch updates on the host. Unfortunately, both approaches introduce prohibitive performance penalties and require large caches for the locks. Range-blocks (RBlox) develops a hardware synchronization facility for DSAs to support dynamic data structures. Our idea is to use key ranges to capture synchronization boundaries and tap into the inherent parallelism of the data-structure layout. We make two novel observations that enable a practical hardware implementation: i) Range locks are symbolic and can compactly represent mutexes on multiple nested objects. Thus, any operation requires fewer range locks, and a small on-chip table suffices (2kb) compared to large caches (256kb) for address-based locks [79, 81]. ii) Ranges also explicitly represent the region of interest, and we can instantly achieve mutual exclusion (instead of relying on ordering). On a 128-tile dataflow DSA, we improve performance by 15×, reduce DRAM bandwidth by 4×, save 70% of on-chip traffic, and require 6.6% of on-chip energy.
items.abstract_zh: 当前的特定于域的体系结构 (DSA) 主要使用静态数据结构，并且发现插入或删除数据具有挑战性（它们仅支持就地更新）。然而，由于 DSA 面向现实世界的应用程序，因此有必要支持可变和动态调整大小的数据结构。 DSA 无法支持动态数据结构，因为它们缺乏同步设施。 DSA 被迫在主机上使用基于地址的原子或批量更新。不幸的是，这两种方法都会带来令人望而却步的性能损失，并且需要大量的锁缓存。 Range-blocks (RBlox) 为 DSA 开发了一种硬件同步工具，以支持动态数据结构。我们的想法是使用关键范围来捕获同步边界并利用数据结构布局的固有并行性。我们进行了两个新颖的观察，以实现实际的硬件实现：i）范围锁是象征性的，可以紧凑地表示多个嵌套对象上的互斥锁。因此，任何操作都需要较少的范围锁，并且与基于地址的锁的大型缓存（256kb）相比，小型片上表（2kb）就足够了[79, 81]。 ii）范围也明确地表示了感兴趣的区域，我们可以立即实现互斥（而不是依赖于排序）。在 128-tile 数据流 DSA 上，我们将性能提高了 15 倍，将 DRAM 带宽减少了 4 倍，节省了 70% 的片上流量，并且需要 6.6% 的片上能源。

items.title: Forecasting GPU Performance for Deep Learning Training and Inference.
items.abstract: Deep learning kernels exhibit a high level of predictable memory accesses and compute patterns, making GPU's architecture well-suited for their execution. Moreover, software and runtime system for GPUs further enable optimizations that aim to better utilize the stream multiprocessors, on-chip bandwidth, multiple levels of cache hierarchy, and off-chip high-bandwidth memory. In the context of deep learning, the entire space of models and GPUs is constantly evolving, as newer models emerge with simultaneous upgrades to the device. However, access to newer GPUs is often limited, raising important questions about the performance of new model architectures on existing GPUs, existing models on new GPUs, and new model architectures on new GPUs. To address these questions, we introduce NeuSight, a forecasting framework to predict the performance of a diverse range of deep learning models, for both training and inference, on unseen GPUs, without requiring actual execution of the target model on the target GPU. The framework leverages both GPU hardware behavior and software library optimizations to estimate the end-to-end performance of these models. We observe that prior work in this area suffers from high absolute error percentages when forecasting performance on unseen models and new GPUs, as they attempt to model the complex task of predicting the latency of a deep learning kernel on a GPU directly using a machine learning approach. Instead, with NeuSight , we decompose the prediction into smaller problems, while bounding the prediction through fundamental performance laws. NeuSight decomposes a single deep learning kernel prediction into smaller working sets called tiles, which are executed independently on the GPU. Tile-granularity predictions are determined using a machine learning approach and aggregated to estimate the end-to-end latency. As such, NeuSight outperforms prior work across a variety of deep learning workloads and the most up-to-date GPUs. It reduces the percentage error from 121.4% and 30.8% to 2.3% in predicting the latency of GPT3 model for training and inference on H100, in comparison to state-of-the-art prior work, respectively, where GPT3 and H100 were not used to train any framework.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习内核表现出高水平的可预测内存访问和计算模式，使得 GPU 架构非常适合其执行。此外，GPU 的软件和运行时系统进一步实现了优化，旨在更好地利用流多处理器、片上带宽、多级缓存层次结构和片外高带宽内存。在深度学习的背景下，模型和 GPU 的整个空间都在不断发展，随着新模型的出现和设备的同步升级。然而，对较新 GPU 的访问通常受到限制，从而引发了有关现有 GPU 上的新模型架构、新 GPU 上的现有模型以及新 GPU 上的新模型架构的性能的重要问题。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 NeuSight，这是一个预测框架，用于预测各种深度学习模型在不可见的 GPU 上的训练和推理性能，而无需在目标 GPU 上实际执行目标模型。该框架利用 GPU 硬件行为和软件库优化来估计这些模型的端到端性能。我们观察到，该领域的先前工作在预测未见过的模型和新 GPU 上的性能时存在较高的绝对错误百分比，因为他们试图直接使用机器学习方法对预测 GPU 上深度学习内核的延迟的复杂任务进行建模。相反，通过 NeuSight，我们将预测分解为更小的问题，同时通过基本性能定律限制预测。 NeuSight 将单个深度学习内核预测分解为称为图块的较小工作集，这些工作集在 GPU 上独立执行。分块粒度预测是使用机器学习方法确定的，并进行聚合以估计端到端延迟。因此，NeuSight 在各种深度学习工作负载和最新的 GPU 上都优于之前的工作。与之前最先进的工作（未使用 GPT3 和 H100 来训练任何框架）相比，它在预测 GPT3 模型在 H100 上训练和推理的延迟时，百分比误差分别从 121.4% 和 30.8% 降低到 2.3%。

items.title: Enhancing CGRA Efficiency Through Aligned Compute and Communication Provisioning.
items.abstract:
Coarse-grained Reconfigurable Arrays (CGRAs) are domain-agnostic accelerators that enhance the energy efficiency of resource-constrained edge devices. The CGRA landscape is diverse, exhibiting trade-offs between performance, efficiency, and architectural specialization. However, CGRAs often overprovision communication resources relative to their modest computing capabilities. This occurs because the theoretically provisioned programmability for CGRAs often proves superfluous in practical implementations.

In this paper, we propose Plaid, a novel CGRA architecture and compiler that aligns compute and communication capabilities, thereby significantly improving energy and area efficiency while preserving its generality and performance. We demonstrate that the dataflow graph, representing the target application, can be decomposed into smaller, recurring communication patterns called motifs. The primary contribution is the identification of these structural motifs within the dataflow graphs and the development of an efficient collective execution and routing strategy tailored to these motifs. The Plaid architecture employs a novel collective processing unit that can execute multiple operations of a motif and route related data dependencies together. The Plaid compiler can hierarchically map the dataflow graph and judiciously schedule the motifs. Our design achieves a 43% reduction in power consumption and 46% area savings compared to the baseline high-performance spatio-temporal CGRA, all while preserving its generality and performance levels. In comparison to the baseline energy-efficient spatial CGRA, Plaid offers a 1.4× performance improvement and a 48% area savings, with almost the same power.
items.abstract_zh:
粗粒度可重构阵列 (CGRA) 是与域无关的加速器，可提高资源受限的边缘设备的能源效率。 CGRA 景观是多样化的，表现出性能、效率和架构专业化之间的权衡。然而，相对于其适度的计算能力，CGRA 经常过度提供通信资源。出现这种情况是因为理论上为 CGRA 提供的可编程性在实际实现中常常被证明是多余的。

在本文中，我们提出了 Plaid，一种新颖的 CGRA 架构和编译器，可以调整计算和通信功能，从而显着提高能源和面积效率，同时保留其通用性和性能。我们证明，代表目标应用程序的数据流图可以分解为更小的、重复出现的通信模式，称为主题。主要贡献是识别数据流图中的这些结构主题，并开发针对这些主题定制的高效集体执行和路由策略。 Plaid 架构采用了一种新颖的集体处理单元，可以执行主题的多个操作并将相关的数据依赖关系一起路由。 Plaid 编译器可以分层映射数据流图并明智地安排主题。与基线高性能时空 CGRA 相比，我们的设计实现了 43% 的功耗降低和 46% 的面积节省，同时保持了其通用性和性能水平。与基准节能空间 CGRA 相比，Plaid 在几乎相同的功率下提供了 1.4 倍的性能提升和 48% 的面积节省。

items.title: MVQ: Towards Efficient DNN Compression and Acceleration with Masked Vector Quantization.
items.abstract:
Vector quantization(VQ) is a hardware-friendly DNN compression method that can reduce the storage cost and weight-loading datawidth of hardware accelerators. However, conventional VQ techniques lead to significant accuracy loss because the important weights are not well preserved. To tackle this problem, a novel approach called MVQ is proposed, which aims at better approximating important weights with a limited number of codewords. At the algorithm level, our approach removes the less important weights through N:M pruning and then minimizes the vector clustering error between the remaining weights and codewords by the masked k-means algorithm. Only distances between the unpruned weights and the codewords are computed, which are then used to update the codewords. At the architecture level, our accelerator implements vector quantization on an EWS (Enhanced weight stationary) CNN accelerator and proposes a sparse systolic array design to maximize the benefits brought by masked vector quantization.

Our algorithm is validated on various models for image classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that MVQ not only outperforms conventional vector quantization methods at comparable compression ratios but also reduces FLOPs. Under ASIC evaluation, our MVQ accelerator boosts energy efficiency by 2.3× and reduces the size of the systolic array by 55% when compared with the base EWS accelerator. Compared to the previous sparse accelerators, MVQ achieves 1.73× higher energy-efficiency.
items.abstract_zh:
矢量量化（VQ）是一种硬件友好的DNN压缩方法，可以降低硬件加速器的存储成本和负载数据宽度。然而，传统的 VQ 技术会导致严重的精度损失，因为重要的权重没有得到很好的保存。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种称为 MVQ 的新方法，其目的是用有限数量的码字更好地逼近重要权重。在算法层面，我们的方法通过 N:M 剪枝去除不太重要的权重，然后通过屏蔽 k 均值算法最小化剩余权重和码字之间的向量聚类误差。仅计算未修剪权重和码字之间的距离，然后将其用于更新码字。在架构层面，我们的加速器在EWS（增强权重固定）CNN加速器上实现矢量量化，并提出稀疏脉动阵列设计，以最大限度地发挥掩蔽矢量量化带来的好处。

我们的算法在图像分类、对象检测和分割任务的各种模型上进行了验证。实验结果表明，MVQ 不仅在相当的压缩比下优于传统的矢量量化方法，而且还减少了 FLOP。在 ASIC 评估下，与基础 EWS 加速器相比，我们的 MVQ 加速器将能效提高了 2.3 倍，并将脉动阵列的尺寸减小了 55%。与之前的稀疏加速器相比，MVQ 的能效提高了 1.73 倍。

items.title: ByteFS: System Support for (CXL-based) Memory-Semantic Solid-State Drives.
items.abstract:
Unlike non-volatile memory that resides on the processor memory bus, memory-semantic solid-state drives (SSDs) support both byte and block access granularity via PCIe or CXL interconnects. They provide scalable memory capacity using NAND flash at a much lower cost. In addition, they have different performance characteristics for their dual byte/block interface respectively, while offering essential memory semantics for upper-level software. Such a byte-accessible storage device provides new implications on the software system design.

In this paper, we develop a new file system, named ByteFS, by rethinking the design primitives of file systems and SSD firmware to exploit the advantages of both byte and block-granular data accesses.
