ByteFS supports byte-granular data persistence to retain the persistence nature of SSDs. It extends the core data structure of file systems by enabling dual byte/block-granular data accesses. To facilitate the support for byte-granular writes, ByteFS manages the internal DRAM of SSD firmware in a log-structured manner and enables data coalescing to reduce the unnecessary I/O traffic to flash chips. ByteFS also enables coordinated data caching between the host page cache and SSD cache for best utilizing the precious memory resource. We implement ByteFS on both a real programmable SSD and an emulated memory-semantic SSD for sensitivity study. Compared to state-of-the-art file systems for non-volatile memory and conventional SSDs, ByteFS outperforms them by up to 2.7×, while preserving the essential properties of a file system. ByteFS also reduces the write traffic to SSDs by up to 5.1× by alleviating unnecessary writes caused by both metadata and data updates in file systems.
items.abstract_zh:
与驻留在处理器内存总线上的非易失性内存不同，内存语义固态驱动器 (SSD) 通过 PCIe 或 CXL 互连支持字节和块访问粒度。它们使用 NAND 闪存以低得多的成本提供可扩展的内存容量。此外，它们的双字节/块接口分别具有不同的性能特征，同时为上层软件提供基本的内存语义。这种字节可访问的存储设备为软件系统设计提供了新的含义。

在本文中，我们通过重新思考文件系统和 SSD 固件的设计原语，开发了一种名为 ByteFS 的新文件系统，以利用字节和块粒度数据访问的优势。 ByteFS支持字节粒度的数据持久化，保留SSD的持久化特性。它通过启用双字节/块粒度数据访问来扩展文件系统的核心数据结构。为了支持字节粒度写入，ByteFS以日志结构的方式管理SSD固件的内部DRAM，并启用数据合并以减少闪存芯片不必要的I/O流量。 ByteFS 还支持主机页面缓存和 SSD 缓存之间的协调数据缓存，以充分利用宝贵的内存资源。我们在真正的可编程 SSD 和模拟内存语义 SSD 上实现 ByteFS 以进行敏感性研究。与最先进的非易失性存储器和传统 SSD 文件系统相比，ByteFS 的性能提升高达 2.7 倍，同时保留了文件系统的基本属性。 ByteFS 还通过减少文件系统中元数据和数据更新引起的不必要写入，将 SSD 的写入流量减少高达 5.1 倍。

items.title: MetaSapiens: Real-Time Neural Rendering with Efficiency-Aware Pruning and Accelerated Foveated Rendering.
items.abstract:
Point-Based Neural Rendering (PBNR) is emerging as a promising class of rendering techniques, which are permeating all aspects of society, driven by a growing demand for real-time, photorealistic rendering in AR/VR and digital twins. Achieving real-time PBNR on mobile devices is challenging.

This paper proposes MetaSapiens, a PBNR system that for the first time delivers real-time neural rendering on mobile devices while maintaining human visual quality. MetaSapiens combines three techniques. First, we present an efficiency-aware pruning technique to optimize rendering speed. Second, we introduce a Foveated Rendering (FR) method for PBNR, leveraging humans' low visual acuity in peripheral regions to relax rendering quality and improve rendering speed. Finally, we propose an accelerator design for FR, addressing the load imbalance issue in (FR-based) PBNR. Our evaluation shows that our system achieves an order of magnitude speedup over existing PBNR models without sacrificing subjective visual quality, as confirmed by a user study. The code and demo are available at: https://horizon-lab.org/metasapiens/.
items.abstract_zh:
基于点的神经渲染 (PBNR) 正在成为一种有前途的渲染技术，在 AR/VR 和数字孪生中对实时、真实感渲染的需求不断增长的推动下，这种技术正在渗透到社会的各个方面。在移动设备上实现实时 PBNR 具有挑战性。

本文提出了 MetaSapiens，这是一种 PBNR 系统，首次在移动设备上提供实时神经渲染，同时保持人类视觉质量。 MetaSapiens 结合了三种技术。首先，我们提出了一种效率感知的修剪技术来优化渲染速度。其次，我们引入了PBNR的注视点渲染（FR）方法，利用人类外围区域的低视力来放宽渲染质量并提高渲染速度。最后，我们提出了一种 FR 加速器设计，解决（基于 FR 的）PBNR 中的负载不平衡问题。我们的评估表明，我们的系统比现有 PBNR 模型实现了一个数量级的加速，并且没有牺牲主观视觉质量，这一点已得到用户研究的证实。代码和演示可在以下网址获取：https://horizo​​n-lab.org/metasapiens/。

items.title: ReSBM: Region-based Scale and Minimal-Level Bootstrapping Management for FHE via Min-Cut.
items.abstract:
The RNS-CKKS scheme in Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) supports crucial features for privacy-preserving machine learning, such as fixed-point arithmetic and SIMD-style vectorization. Yet, managing the escalation of ciphertext scales from homomorphic multiplications, which risks capacity overflow, along with bootstrapping, presents significant challenges. These complexities are exacerbated by the need to efficiently handle scale and bootstrapping at compile time while ensuring rapid encrypted inference.

In this paper, we present ReSBM , a novel compiler technique that simultaneously optimizes scale and bootstrapping for encrypted inference under RNS-CKKS. By partitioning a program's data flow graph (DFG) into regions with a uniform multiplicative depth of one, RESBM ensures that placements of Scale Management Operations (SMOs) and bootstraps affect only the latency of a region, not the scales and levels of its live-out ciphertexts. Our region-based approach tackles the NP-hard challenge of optimal bootstrapping placement with hierarchical strategies: (1) optimal intra-region SMO and bootstrapping placement using min-cut, (2) bootstrapping-guided rescaling region identification across a sequence of regions, culminating in tentative bootstrapping at two terminal regions, and (3) minimal-level bootstrap placement across the DFG, elevating ciphertexts only to the necessary minimal level. Validation across a variety of complex models on CPUs shows that ReSBM not only compiles these models more rapidly than a leading method but also boosts encrypted inference efficiency by an average of 12.1% when compared to another leading method. Consequently, ReSBM substantially improves the practical deployment of large models for encrypted inference, surpassing existing methods in terms of both compilation speed and inference performance.
items.abstract_zh:
全同态加密 (FHE) 中的 RNS-CKKS 方案支持隐私保护机器学习的关键功能，例如定点算术和 SIMD 式矢量化。然而，管理同态乘法带来的密文规模的升级（存在容量溢出的风险）以及自举，提出了重大挑战。由于需要在编译时有效处理规模和引导，同时确保快速加密推理，因此加剧了这些复杂性。

在本文中，我们提出了 ReSBM，这是一种新颖的编译器技术，可同时优化 RNS-CKKS 下加密推理的规模和引导。通过将程序的数据流图 (DFG) 划分为统一乘法深度为 1 的区域，RESBM 确保规模管理操作 (SMO) 和引导程序的放置仅影响区域的延迟，而不影响其实时输出密文的规模和级别。我们的基于区域的方法通过分层策略解决了最佳引导放置的 NP 难题：（1）使用最小切割的最佳区域内 SMO 和引导放置，（2）引导引导的跨一系列区域的重新缩放区域识别，最终在两个终端区域进行尝试性引导，以及（3）跨 DFG 的最低级别引导放置，仅将密文提升到必要的最低水平。在 CPU 上对各种复杂模型的验证表明，ReSBM 不仅比领先方法更快地编译这些模型，而且与其他领先方法相比，加密推理效率平均提高了 12.1%。因此，ReSBM 极大地提高了大型模型加密推理的实际部署，在编译速度和推理性能方面都超越了现有方法。

items.title: BatchZK: A Fully Pipelined GPU-Accelerated System for Batch Generation of Zero-Knowledge Proofs.
items.abstract:
Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) is a cryptographic primitive that enables one party to prove the validity of a statement to other parties without disclosing any secret information. With its widespread adoption in applications such as blockchain and verifiable machine learning, the demand for generating zero-knowledge proofs has increased dramatically. In recent years, considerable efforts have been directed toward developing GPU-accelerated systems for proof generation. However, these previous systems only explored efficiently generating a single proof by reducing latency rather than batch generation to provide high throughput.

We propose a fully pipelined GPU-accelerated system for batch generation of zero-knowledge proofs. Our system has three features to improve throughput. First, we design a pipelined approach that enables each GPU thread to continuously execute its designated proof generation task without being idle. Second, our system supports recent efficient ZKP protocols with their computational modules: sum-check protocol, Merkle tree, and linear-time encoder. We customize these modules to fit our pipelined execution. Third, we adopt a dynamic loading method for the data required for proof generation, reducing the required device memory. Moreover, multi-stream technology enables the overlap of data transfers and GPU computations, reducing overhead caused by data exchanges between host and device memory.

We implement our system and evaluate it on various GPU cards. The results show that our system achieves more than 259.5× higher throughput compared to state-of-the-art GPU-accelerated systems. Moreover, we deploy our system in the verifiable machine learning application, where our system generates 9.52 proofs per second, successfully achieving sub-second proof generation for the first time in this field.
items.abstract_zh:
零知识证明（ZKP）是一种密码学原语，使一方能够向其他方证明声明的有效性，而无需泄露任何秘密信息。随着其在区块链和可验证机器学习等应用中的广泛采用，生成零知识证明的需求急剧增加。近年来，人们投入了大量精力来开发用于证明生成的 GPU 加速系统。然而，这些以前的系统只是探索通过减少延迟来有效地生成单个证明，而不是批量生成来提供高吞吐量。

我们提出了一个完全流水线的 GPU 加速系统，用于批量生成零知识证明。我们的系统具有三个提高吞吐量的功能。首先，我们设计了一种流水线方法，使每个 GPU 线程能够连续执行其指定的证明生成任务而不会空闲。其次，我们的系统支持最新的高效 ZKP 协议及其计算模块：和检查协议、Merkle 树和线性时间编码器。我们定制这些模块以适应我们的流水线执行。第三，我们对证明生成所需的数据采用动态加载方法，减少了所需的设备内存。此外，多流技术可以实现数据传输和GPU计算的重叠，从而减少主机和设备内存之间数据交换带来的开销。

我们实现我们的系统并在各种 GPU 卡上对其进行评估。结果表明，与最先进的 GPU 加速系统相比，我们的系统吞吐量提高了 259.5 倍以上。此外，我们将我们的系统部署在可验证的机器学习应用程序中，我们的系统每秒生成 9.52 个证明，在该领域首次成功实现亚秒级证明生成。

items.title: Fusion: An Analytics Object Store Optimized for Query Pushdown.
items.abstract:
The prevalence of disaggregated storage in public clouds has led to increased latency in modern OLAP cloud databases, particularly when handling ad-hoc and highly-selective queries on large objects. To address this, cloud databases have adopted computation pushdown, executing query predicates closer to the storage layer. However, existing pushdown solutions are inefficient in erasure-coded storage. Cloud storage employs erasure coding that partitions analytics file objects into fixed-sized blocks and distributes them across storage nodes. Consequently, when a specific part of the object is queried, the storage system must reassemble the object across nodes, incurring significant network latency.

In this work, we present Fusion, an object store for analytics that is optimized for query pushdown on erasure-coded data. It co-designs its erasure coding and file placement topologies, taking into account popular analytics file formats (e.g., Parquet). Fusion employs a novel stripe construction algorithm that prevents fragmentation of computable units within an object, and minimizes storage overhead during erasure coding. Compared to existing erasure-coded stores, Fusion improves median and tail latency by 64% and 81%, respectively, on TPC-H, and up to 40% and 48% respectively, on real-world SQL queries. Fusion achieves this while incurring a modest 1.2% storage overhead compared to the optimal.
items.abstract_zh:
公共云中分类存储的盛行导致现代 OLAP 云数据库的延迟增加，特别是在处理大型对象的临时和高选择性查询时。为了解决这个问题，云数据库采用了计算下推，在更接近存储层的位置执行查询谓词。然而，现有的下推解决方案在纠删码存储方面效率低下。云存储采用纠删码，将分析文件对象划分为固定大小的块，并将它们分布在存储节点上。因此，当查询对象的特定部分时，存储系统必须跨节点重新组装对象，从而导致显着的网络延迟。

在这项工作中，我们提出了 Fusion，一种用于分析的对象存储，针对纠删码数据的查询下推进行了优化。它共同设计了纠删码和文件放置拓扑，同时考虑到流行的分析文件格式（例如 Parquet）。 Fusion 采用了一种新颖的条带构造算法，可以防止对象内可计算单元的碎片，并最大限度地减少擦除编码期间的存储开销。与现有的纠删码存储相比，Fusion 在 TPC-H 上将中值延迟和尾部延迟分别提高了 64% 和 81%，在实际 SQL 查询上分别提高了 40% 和 48%。 Fusion 实现了这一目标，同时与最佳存储开销相比，存储开销仅为 1.2%。

items.title: Dilu: Enabling GPU Resourcing-on-Demand for Serverless DL Serving via Introspective Elasticity.
items.abstract: Serverless computing, with its ease of management, auto-scaling, and cost-effectiveness, is widely adopted by deep learning (DL) applications. DL workloads, especially with large language models, require substantial GPU resources to ensure QoS. However, it is prone to produce GPU fragments (e.g., 15%-94%) in serverless DL systems due to the dynamicity of workloads and coarse-grained static GPU allocation mechanisms, gradually eroding the profits offered by serverless elasticity. Different from classical serverless systems that only scale horizontally, we present introspective elasticity (IE), a fine-grained and adaptive two-dimensional co-scaling mechanism to support GPU resourcing-on-demand for serverless DL tasks. Based on this insight, we build Dilu, a cross-layer and GPU-based serverless DL system with IE support. First, Dilu provides multi-factor profiling for DL tasks with efficient pruning search methods. Second, Dilu adheres to the resourcing-complementary principles in scheduling to improve GPU utilization with QoS guarantees. Third, Dilu adopts an adaptive 2D co-scaling method to enhance the elasticity of GPU provisioning in real time. Evaluations show that it can dynamically adjust the resourcing of various DL functions with low GPU fragmentation (10%-46% GPU defragmentation), high throughput (up to 1.8× inference and 1.1× training throughput increment) and QoS guarantees (11%-71% violation rate reduction), compared to the SOTA baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算凭借其易于管理、自动扩展和成本效益的特点，被深度学习（DL）应用广泛采用。深度学习工作负载，尤其是大型语言模型，需要大量 GPU 资源来确保 QoS。然而，由于工作负载的动态性和粗粒度的静态GPU分配机制，在Serverless DL系统中很容易产生GPU碎片（例如15%-94%），逐渐侵蚀Serverless弹性提供的利润。与仅水平扩展的经典无服务器系统不同，我们提出了内省弹性（IE），一种细粒度的自适应二维共缩放机制，以支持无服务器深度学习任务的 GPU 按需资源分配。基于这一见解，我们构建了 Dilu，一个跨层、基于 GPU、支持 IE 的无服务器深度学习系统。首先，Dilu 通过高效的剪枝搜索方法为 DL 任务提供多因素分析。其次，Dilu在调度上坚持资源互补的原则，在保证QoS的情况下提高GPU利用率。第三，Dilu采用自适应2D共缩放方法来增强GPU实时配置的弹性。评估表明，与 SOTA 基线相比，它可以动态调整各种 DL 功能的资源，具有低 GPU 碎片（10%-46% GPU 碎片整理）、高吞吐量（高达 1.8 倍推理和 1.1 倍训练吞吐量增量）和 QoS 保证（违规率降低 11%-71%）。

items.title: Helix: Serving Large Language Models over Heterogeneous GPUs and Network via Max-Flow.
items.abstract: This paper introduces Helix, a distributed system for high-throughput, low-latency large language model (LLM) serving in heterogeneous GPU clusters. The key idea behind Helix is to formulate inference computation of LLMs over heterogeneous GPUs and network connections as a max-flow problem on directed, weighted graphs, whose nodes represent GPU instances and edges capture both GPU and network heterogeneity through their capacities. Helix then uses a mixed integer linear programming (MILP) algorithm to discover highly optimized strategies to serve LLMs on heterogeneous GPUs. This approach allows Helix to jointly optimize model placement and request scheduling, two highly entangled tasks in heterogeneous LLM serving. Our evaluation on several heterogeneous clusters ranging from 24 to 42 GPU nodes shows that Helix improves serving throughput by up to 3.3x and reduces prompting and decoding latency by up to 66% and 24%, respectively, compared to existing approaches. Helix is available at https://github.com/Thesys-lab/Helix-ASPLOS25.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Helix，这是一种在异构 GPU 集群中提供高吞吐量、低延迟大型语言模型 (LLM) 的分布式系统。 Helix 背后的关键思想是将异构 GPU 和网络连接上的 LLM 推理计算制定为有向加权图上的最大流问题，其节点代表 GPU 实例，边通过其能力捕获 GPU 和网络异构性。然后，Helix 使用混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 算法来发现高度优化的策略，以在异构 GPU 上为 LLM 提供服务。这种方法允许 Helix 联合优化模型放置和请求调度，这是异构 LLM 服务中两个高度纠缠的任务。我们对 24 到 42 个 GPU 节点的多个异构集群的评估表明，与现有方法相比，Helix 将服务吞吐量提高了 3.3 倍，并将提示和解码延迟分别减少了 66% 和 24%。 Helix 可从 https://github.com/Thesys-lab/Helix-ASPLOS25 获取。

items.title: Segue & ColorGuard: Optimizing SFI Performance and Scalability on Modern Architectures.
items.abstract: Software-based fault isolation (SFI) enables in-process isolation through compiler instrumentation of memory accesses, and is a critical part of WebAssembly (Wasm). We present two optimizations that improve SFI performance and scalability: Segue uses x86-64 segmentation to reduce the cost of instrumentation on memory accesses, e.g., it eliminates 44.7% of Wasm's overhead on a Wasm-compatible subset of SPEC CPU 2006, and reduces overhead of Wasm-sandboxed font rendering in Firefox by 75%; ColorGuard leverages memory tagging (e.g., MPK), to enable up to a 15× increase in the number of Wasm instances that can run concurrently in a single address space, improving efficiency for high scale server-side workloads. We also explore the challenges of deploying these optimizations in three production toolchains: Wasm2c, WAMR and Wasmtime.
items.abstract_zh: 基于软件的故障隔离 (SFI) 通过内存访问的编译器检测实现进程内隔离，并且是 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的关键部分。我们提出了两种提高 SFI 性能和可扩展性的优化：Segue 使用 x86-64 分段来降低内存访问检测的成本，例如，它消除了 SPEC CPU 2006 的 Wasm 兼容子集上 44.7% 的 Wasm 开销，并将 Firefox 中 Wasm 沙盒字体渲染的开销降低了 75%； ColorGuard 利用内存标记（例如 MPK），使可在单个地址空间中同时运行的 Wasm 实例数量增加多达 15 倍，从而提高大规模服务器端工作负载的效率。我们还探讨了在三个生产工具链中部署这些优化的挑战：Wasm2c、WAMR 和 Wasmtime。

items.title: FSMoE: A Flexible and Scalable Training System for Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Models.
items.abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have tended to leverage sparsity to reduce computations, employing the sparsely activated mixture-of-experts (MoE) technique. MoE introduces four modules, including token routing, token communication, expert computation, and expert parallelism, that impact model quality and training efficiency. To enable ver- satile usage of MoE models, we introduce FSMoE, a flexible training system optimizing task scheduling with three novel techniques: 1) Unified abstraction and online profiling of MoE modules for task scheduling across various MoE implementations. 2) Co-scheduling intra-node and inter-node communications with computations to minimize communication overheads. 3) To support near-optimal task scheduling, we design an adaptive gradient partitioning method for gradient aggregation and a schedule to adaptively pipeline communications and computations. We conduct extensive experiments with configured MoE layers and real-world MoE models on two GPU clusters. Experimental results show that 1) our FSMoE supports four popular types of MoE routing functions and is more efficient than existing implementations (with up to a 1.42× speedup), and 2) FSMoE outperforms the state-of-the-art MoE training systems (DeepSpeed-MoE and Tutel) by 1.18×-1.22× on 1458 MoE layers and 1.19×-3.01× on real-world MoE models based on GPT-2 and Mixtral using a popular routing function. In this work, we present a flexible training system named FSMoE to optimize task scheduling. To achieve this goal: 1) we design unified abstraction and online profiling of MoE modules across various MoE implementations, 2) we co-schedule intra-node and inter-node communications with computations to minimize communication overhead, and 3) we design an adaptive gradient partitioning method for gradient aggregation and a schedule to adaptively pipeline communications and computations. Experimental results on two clusters up to 48 GPUs show that our FSMoE outperforms the state-of-the-art MoE training systems (DeepSpeed-MoE and Tutel) with speedups of 1.18x-1.22x on 1458 customized MoE layers and 1.19x-3.01x on real-world MoE models based on GPT-2 and Mixtral.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的大型语言模型（LLM）倾向于利用稀疏性来减少计算，采用稀疏激活专家混合（MoE）技术。 MoE 引入了四个模块，包括令牌路由、令牌通信、专家计算和专家并行性，这些模块影响模型质量和训练效率。为了实现 MoE 模型的多功能使用，我们引入了 FSMoE，这是一种灵活的训练系统，通过三种新技术优化任务调度：1）MoE 模块的统一抽象和在线分析，用于跨各种 MoE 实现的任务调度。 2）通过计算共同调度节点内和节点间通信，以最小化通信开销。 3）为了支持近乎最优的任务调度，我们设计了一种用于梯度聚合的自适应梯度划分方法以及自适应管道通信和计算的调度。我们在两个 GPU 集群上使用配置的 MoE 层和真实世界的 MoE 模型进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明：1）我们的 FSMoE 支持四种流行类型的 MoE 路由功能，并且比现有实现更高效（加速高达 1.42×），2）FSMoE 在 1458 个 MoE 层上的性能优于最先进的 MoE 训练系统（DeepSpeed-MoE 和 Tutel）1.18×-1.22×，在基于 GPT-2 和 Mixtral 的现实世界 MoE 模型，使用流行的路由功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 FSMoE 的灵活训练系统来优化任务调度。为了实现这一目标：1）我们设计了跨各种 MoE 实现的 MoE 模块的统一抽象和在线分析，2）我们共同调度节点内和节点间通信与计算，以最大限度地减少通信开销，3）我们设计了一种用于梯度聚合的自适应梯度划分方法以及自适应管道通信和计算的调度。两个集群（最多 48 个 GPU）上的实验结果表明，我们的 FSMoE 优于最先进的 MoE 训练系统（DeepSpeed-MoE 和 Tutel），在 1458 个定制 MoE 层上的加速率为 1.18x-1.22x，在基于 GPT-2 和 Mixtral 的真实 MoE 模型上的加速率为 1.19x-3.01x。

items.title: vAttention: Dynamic Memory Management for Serving LLMs without PagedAttention.
items.abstract:
PagedAttention is a popular approach for dynamic memory allocation in LLM serving systems. It enables on-demand allocation of GPU memory to mitigate KV cache fragmentation - a phenomenon that crippled the batch size (and consequently throughput) in prior systems. However, in trying to allocate physical memory at runtime, PagedAttention ends up changing the virtual memory layout of the KV cache from contiguous to non-contiguous. Such a design leads to non-trivial programming and performance overheads.

We present vAttention - an approach that mitigates fragmentation in physical memory while retaining the virtual memory contiguity of the KV cache. We achieve this by decoupling the allocation of virtual and physical memory using CUDA virtual memory management APIs. We also introduce various LLM-specific optimizations to address the limitations of CUDA virtual memory support. Overall, vAttention is a simpler, portable, and performant alternative to PagedAttention: it supports various attention kernels out-of-the-box and improves LLM serving throughput by up to 1.23× compared to the use of PagedAttention-based kernels of FlashAttention-2 and FlashInfer.
items.abstract_zh:
PagedAttention 是 LLM 服务系统中动态内存分配的一种流行方法。它支持按需分配 GPU 内存，以减轻 KV 缓存碎片——这种现象会削弱先前系统中的批量大小（进而削弱吞吐量）。然而，在运行时尝试分配物理内存时，PagedAttention 最终会将 KV 缓存的虚拟内存布局从连续更改为非连续。这样的设计会导致不平凡的编程和性能开销。

我们提出了 vAttention - 一种减少物理内存碎片的方法，同时保留 KV 缓存的虚拟内存连续性。我们通过使用 CUDA 虚拟内存管理 API 解耦虚拟内存和物理内存的分配来实现这一目标。我们还引入了各种 LLM 特定的优化来解决 CUDA 虚拟内存支持的限制。总体而言，vAttention 是 PagedAttention 的更简单、可移植且高性能的替代方案：与使用基于 PagedAttention 的 FlashAttention-2 和 FlashInfer 内核相比，它支持开箱即用的各种注意力内核，并将 LLM 服务吞吐量提高了 1.23 倍。

items.title: Accelerating Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
items.abstract:
An evolving solution to address hallucination and enhance accuracy in large language models (LLMs) is Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), which involves augmenting LLMs with information retrieved from an external knowledge source, such as the web. This paper profiles several RAG execution pipelines and demystifies the complex interplay between their retrieval and generation phases. We demonstrate that while exact retrieval schemes are expensive, they can reduce inference time compared to approximate retrieval variants because an exact retrieval model can send a smaller but more accurate list of documents to the generative model while maintaining the same end-to-end accuracy. This observation motivates the acceleration of the exact nearest neighbor search for RAG.

In this work, we design Intelligent Knowledge Store (IKS), a type-2 CXL device that implements a scale-out near-memory acceleration architecture with a novel cache-coherent interface between the host CPU and near-memory accelerators. IKS offers 13.4--27.9× faster exact nearest neighbor search over a 512GB vector database compared with executing the search on Intel Sapphire Rapids CPUs. This higher search performance translates to 1.7--26.3× lower end-to-end inference time for representative RAG applications. IKS is inherently a memory expander; its internal DRAM can be disaggregated and used for other applications running on the server to prevent DRAM -- which is the most expensive component in today's servers -- from being stranded.
items.abstract_zh:
检索增强生成 (RAG) 是一种解决幻觉并提高大型语言模型 (LLM) 准确性的不断发展的解决方案，它涉及使用从外部知识源（例如网络）检索的信息来增强 LLM。本文介绍了几个 RAG 执行管道，并揭示了它们的检索和生成阶段之间复杂的相互作用。我们证明，虽然精确检索方案很昂贵，但与近似检索变体相比，它们可以减少推理时间，因为精确检索模型可以向生成模型发送更小但更准确的文档列表，同时保持相同的端到端准确性。这一观察结果促进了 RAG 精确最近邻搜索的加速。

在这项工作中，我们设计了智能知识存储 (IKS)，这是一种 2 类 CXL 设备，它实现了横向扩展近内存加速架构，并在主机 CPU 和近内存加速器之间具有新颖的缓存一致性接口。与在 Intel Sapphire Rapids CPU 上执行搜索相比，IKS 在 512GB 矢量数据库上提供的精确最近邻搜索速度提高了 13.4--27.9 倍。对于代表性的 RAG 应用程序来说，更高的搜索性能意味着端到端推理时间缩短了 1.7--26.3 倍。 IKS本质上是一个内存扩展器；其内部 DRAM 可以分解并用于服务器上运行的其他应用程序，以防止 DRAM（当今服务器中最昂贵的组件）陷入困境。

items.title: MOAT: Securely Mitigating Rowhammer with Per-Row Activation Counters.
items.abstract:
Rowhammer has worsened over the last decade. Existing in-DRAM solutions, such as TRR, were broken with simple patterns. In response, the DDR5 specifications have been extended to support Per-Row Activation Counting (PRAC) , with counters inlined with each row, and ALERT-Back-Off (ABO) to stop the memory controller if the DRAM needs more time to mitigate. Although PRAC+ABO represents a strong advance in Rowhammer protection, they are just a framework, and the actual security is dependent on the implementation.

In this paper, we first show that a prior work, Panopticon (which formed the basis for PRAC+ABO), is insecure, as our Jailbreak pattern can cause 1150 activations on an attack row for Panopticon configured for a threshold of 128. We then propose MOAT , a provably secure design, which uses two internal thresholds: ETH , an Eligibility Threshold for mitigating a row, and ATH , an ALERT Threshold for initiating an ABO. As JEDEC specifications permit a few activations between consecutive ALERTs, we also study how an attacker can exploit such activations to inflict more activations than ATH on an attack row and thus increase the tolerated Rowhammer threshold. Our analysis shows that MOAT configured with ATH=64 can safely tolerate a Rowhammer threshold of 99. Finally, we also study performance attacks and denial-of-service due to ALERTs. Our evaluations, with SPEC and GAP workloads, show that MOAT with ATH=64 incurs an average slowdown of 0.27% and 7 bytes of SRAM per bank.
items.abstract_zh:
Rowhammer 的情况在过去十年中不断恶化。现有的 DRAM 解决方案（例如 TRR）被简单的模式所打破。作为回应，DDR5 规范已扩展为支持每行激活计数 (PRAC)（每行内联计数器）和警报后退 (ABO)，以在 DRAM 需要更多时间来缓解时停止内存控制器。尽管 PRAC+ABO 代表了 Rowhammer 保护的巨大进步，但它们只是一个框架，实际的安全性取决于实施。

在本文中，我们首先表明之前的工作 Panopticon（构成 PRAC+ABO 的基础）是不安全的，因为我们的越狱模式可能会导致配置为 128 阈值的 Panopticon 攻击行上有 1150 次激活。然后我们提出 MOAT，这是一种可证明安全的设计，它使用两个内部阈值：ETH（用于缓解行的资格阈值）和 ATH（警报阈值）启动 ABO。由于 JEDEC 规范允许在连续警报之间进行几次激活，因此我们还研究了攻击者如何利用此类激活对攻击行造成比 ATH 更多的激活，从而提高了容忍的 Rowhammer 阈值。我们的分析表明，配置为 ATH=64 的 MOAT 可以安全地容忍 Rowhammer 阈值 99。最后，我们还研究了由于警报而导致的性能攻击和拒绝服务。我们对 SPEC 和 GAP 工作负载的评估表明，ATH=64 的 MOAT 平均速度下降 0.27%，每个存储体需要 7 字节的 SRAM。

items.title: ClosureX: Compiler Support for Correct Persistent Fuzzing.
items.abstract:
Fuzzing is a widely adopted and pragmatic methodology for bug hunting as a means of software hardening. Research reveals that increasing fuzzing throughput directly increases bug discovery rate. The highest performance fuzzing strategy is persistent fuzzing, which reuses a single process for all test cases by looping back to the start upon completion, instead of exiting. This eliminates all process creation, initialization, and tear-down costs---which are on-par with execution cost. Unfortunately, persistent fuzzing leads to semantically inconsistent program states because process state changes from one test case remain for subsequent test cases. This semantic inconsistency results in missed crashes, false crashes, and overall incorrectness that undermines fuzzer effectiveness.

We observe that existing fuzzing execution mechanisms exist on a continuum, based on the amount of state that gets discarded and restored between test cases. We present ClosureX , a fuzzing execution mechanism that sits at a new spot on this state restoration continuum, where only test-case-execution-specific state is reset. This fine-grain state restoration provides near-persistent performance with the correctness of heavyweight state restoration. We construct ClosureX as a set of LLVM passes that integrate with AFL++. Our evaluation on ten popular open-source fuzzing targets show that ClosureX maintains semantic correctness, while increasing test case execution rate by over 3.5x, on average, compared to AFL++. ClosureX also finds bugs more consistently and 1.9x faster than AFL++, with ClosureX discovering 15 0-day bugs (4 CVEs).
items.abstract_zh:
模糊测试是一种广泛采用且实用的错误查找方法，作为软件强化的一种手段。研究表明，增加模糊测试吞吐量会直接提高错误发现率。最高性能的模糊测试策略是持久模糊测试，它通过在完成后循环回到开始而不是退出来对所有测试用例重用单个进程。这消除了所有流程创建、初始化和拆卸成本——这些成本与执行成本相当。不幸的是，持续的模糊测试会导致语义上不一致的程序状态，因为一个测试用例的流程状态更改仍然适用于后续测试用例。这种语义不一致会导致错过崩溃、错误崩溃和整体错误，从而破坏模糊器的有效性。

我们观察到，现有的模糊执行机制存在于一个连续体上，基于测试用例之间被丢弃和恢复的状态量。我们提出了 ClosureX，一种模糊测试执行机制，它位于状态恢复连续体的一个新位置，其中仅重置测试用例执行特定的状态。这种细粒度状态恢复提供了近乎持久的性能以及重量级状态恢复的正确性。我们将 ClosureX 构建为一组与 AFL++ 集成的 LLVM 通道。我们对十个流行的开源模糊测试目标的评估表明，与 AFL++ 相比，ClosureX 保持了语义正确性，同时将测试用例执行率平均提高了 3.5 倍以上。 ClosureX 发现 bug 的速度也比 AFL++ 更一致，速度比 AFL++ 快 1.9 倍，ClosureX 发现了 15 个 0-day bug（4 个 CVE）。

items.title: Coach: Exploiting Temporal Patterns for All-Resource Oversubscription in Cloud Platforms.
items.abstract:
Cloud platforms remain underutilized despite multiple proposals to improve their utilization (e.g., disaggregation, harvesting, and oversubscription). Our characterization of the resource utilization of virtual machines (VMs) in Azure reveals that, while CPU is the main underutilized resource, we need to provide a solution to manage all resources holistically. We also observe that many VMs exhibit complementary temporal patterns, which can be leveraged to improve the oversubscription of underutilized resources.

Based on these insights, we propose Coach: a system that exploits temporal patterns for all-resource oversubscription in cloud platforms. Coach uses long-term predictions and an efficient VM scheduling policy to exploit temporally complementary patterns. We introduce a new general-purpose VM type, called CoachVM, where we partition each resource allocation into a guaranteed and an oversubscribed portion. Coach monitors the oversubscribed resources to detect contention and mitigate any potential performance degradation. We focus on memory management, which is particularly challenging due to memory's sensitivity to contention and the overhead required to reassign it between CoachVMs. Our experiments show that Coach enables platforms to host up to ~26% more VMs with minimal performance degradation.
items.abstract_zh:
尽管有多项提高云平台利用率的建议（例如，分解、收获和超额订阅），但云平台的利用率仍然不足。我们对 Azure 中虚拟机 (VM) 资源利用率的描述表明，虽然 CPU 是未充分利用的主要资源，但我们需要提供一种解决方案来全面管理所有资源。我们还观察到许多虚拟机表现出互补的时间模式，可以利用这些模式来改善未充分利用资源的超额订阅。

基于这些见解，我们提出了 Coach：一种利用时间模式实现云平台中所有资源超额订阅的系统。 Coach 使用长期预测和高效的 VM 调度策略来利用时间互补模式。我们引入了一种新的通用 VM 类型，称为 CoachVM，其中我们将每个资源分配划分为保证部分和超额订阅部分。 Coach 监视超额订阅的资源，以检测争用并缓解任何潜在的性能下降。我们专注于内存管理，由于内存对争用的敏感性以及在 CoachVM 之间重新分配内存所需的开销，这尤其具有挑战性。我们的实验表明，Coach 使平台能够托管多达约 26% 的虚拟机，同时性能下降最小。

items.title: DarwinGame: Playing Tournaments for Tuning Applications in Noisy Cloud Environments.
items.abstract: This work introduces a new subarea of performance tuning -- performance tuning in a shared interference-prone computing environment. We demonstrate that existing tuners are significantly suboptimal by design because of their inability to account for interference during tuning. Our solution, DarwinGame, employs a tournament-based design to systematically compare application executions with different tunable parameter configurations, enabling it to identify the relative performance of different tunable parameter configurations in a noisy environment. Compared to existing solutions, DarwinGame achieves more than 27% reduction in execution time, with less than 0.5% performance variability. DarwinGame is the first performance tuner that will help developers tune their applications in shared, interference-prone, cloud environments.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了性能调优的一个新子领域——共享易受干扰的计算环境中的性能调优。我们证明现有的调谐器在设计上明显不理想，因为它们无法在调谐过程中考虑干扰。我们的解决方案 DarwinGame 采用基于锦标赛的设计来系统地比较具有不同可调参数配置的应用程序执行情况，使其能够识别不同可调参数配置在嘈杂环境中的相对性能。与现有解决方案相比，DarwinGame 的执行时间缩短了 27% 以上，性能波动性低于 0.5%。 DarwinGame 是第一个性能调优器，可帮助开发人员在共享、易受干扰的云环境中调优其应用程序。

items.title: Target-Aware Implementation of Real Expressions.
items.abstract:
New low-precision accelerators, vector instruction sets, and library functions make maximizing accuracy and performance of numerical code increasingly challenging. Two lines of work---traditional compilers and numerical compilers---attack this problem from opposite directions. Traditional compiler backends optimize for specific target environments but are limited in their ability to balance performance and accuracy. Numerical compilers trade off accuracy and performance, or even improve both, but ignore the target environment. We join aspects of both to produce Chassis, a target-aware numerical compiler.

Chassis compiles mathematical expressions to operators from a target description, which lists the real expressions each operator approximates and estimates its cost and accuracy. Chassis then uses an iterative improvement loop to optimize for speed and accuracy. Specifically, a new instruction selection modulo equivalence algorithm efficiently searches for faster target-specific programs, while a new cost-opportunity heuristic supports iterative improvement. We demonstrate Chassis capabilities on 9 different targets, including hardware ISAs, math libraries, and programming languages. Chassis finds better accuracy and performance trade-offs than both Clang (by 3.5×) or Herbie (by up to 2.0×) by leveraging low-precision accelerators, accuracy-optimized numerical helper functions, and library subcomponents.
items.abstract_zh:
新的低精度加速器、矢量指令集和库函数使得最大限度地提高数字代码的准确性和性能变得越来越具有挑战性。两种工作方式——传统编译器和数值编译器——从相反的方向解决这个问题。传统的编译器后端针对特定目标环境进行优化，但平衡性能和准确性的能力受到限制。数值编译器会权衡准确性和性能，甚至提高两者，但忽略目标环境。我们结合两者的各个方面来生产 Chassis，一个目标感知的数值编译器。

Chassis 将目标描述中的数学表达式编译为运算符，其中列出了每个运算符近似的真实表达式并估计其成本和准确性。然后，底盘使用迭代改进循环来优化速度和准确性。具体来说，新的指令选择模等价算法可以有效地搜索更快的特定目标程序，而新的成本机会启发式算法则支持迭代改进。我们在 9 个不同的目标上演示了机箱功能，包括硬件 ISA、数学库和编程语言。通过利用低精度加速器、精度优化的数值辅助函数和库子组件，Chassis 发现比 Clang（提高 3.5 倍）或 Herbie（高达 2.0 倍）更好的精度和性能权衡。

items.title: Copper and Wire: Bridging Expressiveness and Performance for Service Mesh Policies.
items.abstract: Distributed microservice applications require a convenient means of controlling L7 communication between services. Service meshes have emerged as a popular approach to achieving this. However, current service mesh frameworks are difficult to use -- they burden developers in realizing even simple communication policies, lack compatibility with diverse dataplanes, and introduce performance and resource overheads. We identify the root causes of these drawbacks and propose a ground-up new mesh architecture that overcomes them. We develop novel abstractions for mesh communication, a new mesh policy language centered on these abstractions to enable expressive policies, and a novel control plane that enables using minimal dataplane resources for policy enforcement. We develop the precise semantics of our language abstractions and demonstrate how our control plane can use them to execute policies correctly and optimally. We build and evaluate a prototype on realistic workloads and policies and open-source production traces. Our results show that complex policies can be specified in up to 6.75× fewer lines, enforced with up to 2.6× smaller tail latencies and up to 39% fewer CPU resources than today.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式微服务应用程序需要一种方便的方法来控制服务之间的 L7 通信。服务网格已成为实现这一目标的流行方法。然而，当前的服务网格框架很难使用——它们给开发人员带来了实现简单通信策略的负担，缺乏与不同数据平面的兼容性，并引入了性能和资源开销。我们确定了这些缺点的根本原因，并提出了一种全新的网格架构来克服这些缺点。我们为网状通信开发了新颖的抽象，一种以这些抽象为中心的新的网状策略语言，以实现富有表现力的策略，以及一种新颖的控制平面，可以使用最少的数据平面资源来执行策略。我们开发了语言抽象的精确语义，并演示了我们的控制平面如何使用它们来正确、最佳地执行策略。我们根据实际工作负载和策略以及开源生产跟踪构建和评估原型。我们的结果表明，与现在相比，复杂策略的指定行数最多可减少 6.75 倍，执行时尾部延迟最多可减少 2.6 倍，CPU 资源最多可减少 39%。

items.title: PCcheck: Persistent Concurrent Checkpointing for ML.
items.abstract:
Training large-scale machine learning (ML) models is expensive and time-intensive, consuming many hardware accelerators for days or weeks. As the scale of hardware deployments and training time continue to grow, the probability of failures also increases. The desire to use cheaper cloud resources, such as spot VMs, to lower costs also dramatically increases the frequency of failures. The standard approach to deal with failures is to periodically pause training and checkpoint model parameters to persistent storage. Unfortunately, today's checkpointing mechanisms introduce high overhead when applied at high frequencies, yet frequent checkpointing is necessary to avoid long recovery times.

We present a concurrent checkpointing mechanism, PCcheck, that allows frequent checkpointing with minimal overhead. Our framework supports persisting checkpoints to SSD and persistent main memory (PMEM) for both single-machine and distributed settings. PCcheck enables checkpointing as frequently as every 10 iterations for detailed monitoring and fast recovery times in case of failures, while maintaining minimal (3%) overhead on training throughput.
items.abstract_zh:
训练大规模机器学习 (ML) 模型既昂贵又耗时，需要消耗许多硬件加速器数天或数周。随着硬件部署规模和训练时间不断增长，失败的概率也随之增加。使用更便宜的云资源（例如现货虚拟机）来降低成本的愿望也大大增加了故障频率。处理故障的标准方法是定期暂停训练并将模型参数检查点到持久存储。不幸的是，当今的检查点机制在高频应用时会带来较高的开销，但需要频繁的检查点以避免较长的恢复时间。

我们提出了一种并发检查点机制 PCcheck，它允许以最小的开销进行频繁的检查点。我们的框架支持单机和分布式设置的 SSD 和持久主内存 (PMEM) 的持久检查点。 PCcheck 能够以每 10 次迭代的频率设置检查点，以便在发生故障时进行详细监控和快速恢复，同时保持训练吞吐量的最小开销 (3%)。

items.title: EDM: An Ultra-Low Latency Ethernet Fabric for Memory Disaggregation.
items.abstract: Achieving low remote memory access latency remains the primary challenge in realizing memory disaggregation over Ethernet within the datacenters. We present EDM that attempts to overcome this challenge using two key ideas. First, while existing network protocols for remote memory access over the Ethernet, such as TCP/IP and RDMA, are implemented on top of the Ethernet MAC layer, EDM takes a radical approach by implementing the entire network protocol stack for remote memory access within the Physical layer (PHY) of the Ethernet. This overcomes fundamental latency and bandwidth overheads imposed by the MAC layer, especially for small memory messages. Second, EDM implements a centralized, fast, in-network scheduler for memory traffic within the PHY of the Ethernet switch. Inspired by the classic Parallel Iterative Matching (PIM) algorithm, the scheduler dynamically reserves bandwidth between compute and memory nodes by creating virtual circuits in the PHY, thus eliminating queuing delay and layer 2 packet processing delay at the switch for memory traffic, while maintaining high bandwidth utilization. Our FPGA testbed demonstrates that EDM's network fabric incurs a latency of only ~300 ns for remote memory access in an unloaded network, which is an order of magnitude lower than state-of-the-art Ethernet-based solutions such as RoCEv2 and comparable to emerging PCIe-based solutions such as CXL. Larger-scale network simulations indicate that even at high network loads, EDM's average latency remains within 1.3x its unloaded latency.
items.abstract_zh: 实现低远程内存访问延迟仍然是在数据中心内通过以太网实现内存分解的主要挑战。我们提出的 EDM 尝试使用两个关键思想来克服这一挑战。首先，虽然用于通过以太网进行远程内存访问的现有网络协议（例如 TCP/IP 和 RDMA）是在以太网 MAC 层之上实现的，但 EDM 采取了一种激进的方法，在以太网的物理层 (PHY) 内实现用于远程内存访问的整个网络协议栈。这克服了 MAC 层带来的基本延迟和带宽开销，特别是对于小内存消息。其次，EDM 为以太网交换机 PHY 内的内存流量实现了集中式、快速的网络内调度程序。受经典并行迭代匹配 (PIM) 算法的启发，调度程序通过在 PHY 中创建虚拟电路来动态预留计算节点和内存节点之间的带宽，从而消除内存流量交换机上的排队延迟和第 2 层数据包处理延迟，同时保持高带宽利用率。我们的 FPGA 测试台表明，EDM 的网络结构在空载网络中进行远程内存访问时仅产生约 300 ns 的延迟，这比 RoCEv2 等最先进的基于以太网的解决方案低一个数量级，与 CXL 等新兴的基于 PCIe 的解决方案相当。更大规模的网络模拟表明，即使在高网络负载下，EDM 的平均延迟仍保持在其空载延迟的 1.3 倍以内。

items.title: FleetIO: Managing Multi-Tenant Cloud Storage with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract:
Cloud platforms have been virtualizing storage devices like flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs) to make effective use of storage resources. They enable either software-isolated instance or hardware-isolated instance for facilitating the storage sharing between multi-tenant applications. However, for decades, they have to combat the fundamental tussle between the performance isolation and resource utilization. They suffer from either long tail latency caused by weak isolation or low storage utilization caused by strong isolation.

In this paper, we present FleetIO, a learning-based storage virtualization framework that employs reinforcement learning (RL) for managing virtualized SSDs. FleetIO explores the unique features of RL to handle the dynamic changes of application workloads and storage states, and integrates the storage scheduling into the RL decision-making process. It achieves both performance isolation and improved storage utilization by enabling dynamic fine-grained storage harvesting across collocated application instances, while minimizing its negative impact on their service-level objectives (SLOs). FleetIO clusters workloads into different types (e.g., latency-sensitive and bandwidth-intensive) based on the collected I/O traces at runtime, and fine-tunes the RL reward functions for each type of workloads. We implement FleetIO on a real programmable SSD board and evaluate it with diverse cloud applications. We show that FleetIO improves the overall storage utilization of the shared SSD by up to 1.4×, and decreases the tail latency of I/O requests by 1.5× on average, compared to the state-of-the-art storage sharing approaches.
items.abstract_zh:
云平台一直在虚拟化基于闪存的固态硬盘（SSD）等存储设备，以有效利用存储资源。它们支持软件隔离实例或硬件隔离实例，以促进多租户应用程序之间的存储共享。然而，几十年来，他们必须应对性能隔离和资源利用之间的根本斗争。它们要么遭受弱隔离导致的长尾延迟，要么遭受强隔离导致的低存储利用率。

在本文中，我们提出了 FleetIO，这是一种基于学习的存储虚拟化框架，它采用强化学习 (RL) 来管理虚拟化 SSD。 FleetIO 探索了 RL 的独特功能来处理应用程序工作负载和存储状态的动态变化，并将存储调度集成到 RL 决策过程中。它通过在并置应用程序实例之间启用动态细粒度存储收集来实现性能隔离和提高存储利用率，同时最大限度地减少其对服务级别目标 (SLO) 的负面影响。 FleetIO 根据运行时收集的 I/O 跟踪将工作负载分为不同类型（例如，延迟敏感型和带宽密集型），并针对每种类型的工作负载微调 RL 奖励函数。我们在真正的可编程 SSD 板上实现 FleetIO，并使用各种云应用程序对其进行评估。我们发现，与最先进的存储共享方法相比，FleetIO 将共享 SSD 的整体存储利用率提高了 1.4 倍，并将 I/O 请求的尾部延迟平均降低了 1.5 倍。

items.title: Optimizing Datalog for the GPU.
items.abstract: Modern Datalog engines (e.g., LogicBlox, Soufflé, ddlog) enable their users to write declarative queries which compute recursive deductions over extensional facts, leaving high-performance operationalization (query planning, semi-naïve evaluation, and parallelization) to the engine. Such engines form the backbone of modern high-throughput applications in static analysis, network monitoring, and social-media mining. In this paper, we present a methodology for implementing a modern in-memory Datalog engine on data center GPUs, allowing us to achieve significant (up to 45×) gains compared to Soufflé (a modern CPU-based engine) on context-sensitive points-to analysis of httpd. We present GPU log , a Datalog engine backend that implements iterated relational algebra kernels over a novel range-indexed data structure we call the hash-indexed sorted array (HISA). HISA combines the algorithmic benefits of incremental range-indexed relations with the raw computation throughput of operations over dense data structures. Our experiments show that GPU log is significantly faster than CPU-based Datalog engines, while achieving favorable memory footprint compared to contemporary GPU-based joins.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据日志引擎（例如 LogicBlox、Soufflé、ddlog）使用户能够编写声明性查询，计算外延事实的递归推论，将高性能操作（查询规划、半天真评估和并行化）留给引擎。此类引擎构成了静态分析、网络监控和社交媒体挖掘等现代高吞吐量应用的支柱。在本文中，我们提出了一种在数据中心 GPU 上实现现代内存数据记录引擎的方法，与 Soufflé（基于 CPU 的现代引擎）相比，我们在 httpd 的上下文相关点分析方面获得了显着的收益（高达 45 倍）。我们提出了 GPU log，这是一种数据记录引擎后端，它在我们称为哈希索引排序数组 (HISA) 的新型范围索引数据结构上实现迭代关系代数内核。 HISA 将增量范围索引关系的算法优势与密集数据结构上的操作的原始计算吞吐量相结合。我们的实验表明，GPU 日志比基于 CPU 的数据日志引擎快得多，同时与当代基于 GPU 的连接相比，实现了有利的内存占用。

items.title: Tela: A Temporal Load-Aware Cloud Virtual Disk Placement Scheme.
items.abstract:
Cloud Block Storage (CBS) relies on Cloud Virtual Disks (CVDs) to provide block interfaces to Cloud Virtual Machines. The process of allocating user-subscribed CVDs to physical storage warehouses in cloud data centers, known as CVD placement, significantly impacts resource utilization, load balancing, and I/O performance. However, previous works have failed to account for temporal fluctuations in cloud loads, resulting in imbalanced loads, low resource utilization, and frequent warehouse overloads.

To address these issues, we propose Tela , the first temporal load-aware CVD placement scheme. Using a series of interpretable models, Tela predicts the temporal load characteristics and values of CVDs, as well as potential peak loads in warehouses. Guided by these predictions, TELA places CVDs into warehouses according to their load patterns, aiming for peak shaving and load balancing while preventing overloads. Experimental results show that Tela significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art scheme, reducing overload occurrences by 86.8-93.8%, reducing P99 overload duration by 92.6%, and decreasing load imbalance by 36.7-44.4%.
items.abstract_zh:
云块存储 (CBS) 依靠云虚拟磁盘 (CVD) 为云虚拟机提供块接口。将用户订阅的 CVD 分配到云数据中心的物理存储仓库的过程（称为 CVD 放置）会显着影响资源利用率、负载平衡和 I/O 性能。然而，之前的工作未能考虑云负载的时间波动，导致负载不平衡、资源利用率低和仓库频繁超载。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出 Tela，第一个时间负载感知的 CVD 放置方案。 Tela 使用一系列可解释的模型来预测 CVD 的时间负载特征和值，以及仓库中的潜在峰值负载。在这些预测的指导下，TELA 根据 CVD 的负载模式将其放入仓库，旨在实现调峰和负载平衡，同时防止过载。实验结果表明，Tela明显优于最先进的方案，过载发生次数减少了86.8-93.8%，P99过载持续时间减少了92.6%，负载不平衡减少了36.7-44.4%。

items.title: RTL Verification for Secure Speculation Using Contract Shadow Logic.
items.abstract:
Modern out-of-order processors face speculative execution attacks. Despite various proposed software and hardware mitigations to prevent such attacks, new attacks keep arising from unknown vulnerabilities. Thus, a formal and rigorous evaluation of the ability of hardware designs to deal with speculative execution attacks is urgently desired.

This paper proposes a formal verification technique called Contract Shadow Logic that can considerably improve RTL verification scalability with little manual effort while being applicable to different defense mechanisms. In this technique, we leverage computer architecture design insights to improve verification performance for checking security properties formulated as software-hardware contracts for secure speculation. Our verification scheme is accessible to computer architects and requires minimal formal-method expertise.

We evaluate our technique on multiple RTL designs, including three out-of-order processors. The experimental results demonstrate that our technique exhibits a significant advantage in finding attacks on insecure designs and deriving complete proofs on secure designs, when compared to the baseline and two state-of-the-art verification schemes, LEAVE and UPEC.
items.abstract_zh:
现代乱序处理器面临推测执行攻击。尽管提出了各种软件和硬件缓解措施来防止此类攻击，但未知漏洞不断引发新的攻击。因此，迫切需要对硬件设计处理推测执行攻击的能力进行正式且严格的评估。

本文提出了一种称为“Contract Shadow Logic”的形式化验证技术，该技术可以显着提高 RTL 验证的可扩展性，只需很少的手动工作，同时适用于不同的防御机制。在这项技术中，我们利用计算机体系结构设计见解来提高验证性能，以检查制定为软件-硬件合约的安全属性以进行安全推测。我们的验证方案可供计算机架构师使用，并且需要最少的形式方法专业知识。

我们在多个 RTL 设计（包括三个乱序处理器）上评估我们的技术。实验结果表明，与基线和两种最先进的验证方案 LEAVE 和 UPEC 相比，我们的技术在发现对不安全设计的攻击和导出安全设计的完整证明方面表现出显着的优势。

items.title: pulse: Accelerating Distributed Pointer-Traversals on Disaggregated Memory.
items.abstract: Caches at CPU nodes in disaggregated memory architectures amortize the high data access latency over the network. However, such caches are fundamentally unable to improve performance for workloads requiring pointer traversals across linked data structures. We argue for accelerating these pointer traversals closer to disaggregated memory in a manner that preserves expressiveness for supporting various linked structures, ensures energy efficiency and performance, and supports distributed execution. We design pulse , a distributed pointer-traversal framework for rack-scale disaggregated memory to meet all the above requirements. Our evaluation of pulse shows that it enables low-latency, high-throughput, and energy-efficient execution for a wide range of pointer traversal workloads on disaggregated memory that fare poorly with caching alone.
items.abstract_zh: 分散内存架构中 CPU 节点的缓存可分摊网络上的高数据访问延迟。然而，此类缓存从根本上无法提高需要跨链接数据结构进行指针遍历的工作负载的性能。我们主张以一种保留支持各种链接结构的表达能力、确保能源效率和性能并支持分布式执行的方式加速这些指针遍历，使其更接近分解内存。我们设计了pulse，一个用于机架级分解内存的分布式指针遍历框架，以满足上述所有要求。我们对 Pulse 的评估表明，它可以为分类内存上的各种指针遍历工作负载提供低延迟、高吞吐量和节能的执行，而仅靠缓存效果不佳。

items.title: UniZK: Accelerating Zero-Knowledge Proof with Unified Hardware and Flexible Kernel Mapping.
items.abstract: Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) is an important cryptographic tool that sees wide applications in real-world scenarios where privacy must be protected, including privacy-preserving blockchains and zero-knowledge machine learning. Existing ZKP acceleration approaches using GPUs, FPGAs, and ASICs focus only on classic protocols that rely on expensive elliptic curve arithmetics. Emerging ZKP protocols based on hash functions can greatly reduce the algorithmic complexity, but they also introduce much more diverse computation kernels that cannot be efficiently handled by a single accelerator chip if dedicated units for each kernel are used. Our approach is to leverage a unified hardware architecture that is able to efficiently support the common primitives in ZKP, and then use smart mapping strategies to flexibly map various kernels to such hardware while ensuring high resource utilization. We design UniZK as such a ZKP accelerator, with a systolic-array-based hardware architecture enhanced with extra local links and a new vector processing mode. We propose novel mapping strategies to support diverse kernels including number theoretic transforms, hash functions, and general polynomial computations. UniZK provides 97x and 46x speedups on average compared to the CPU and GPU implementations of the same protocols, and is also 840x faster than previous ZKP accelerators using different protocols.
items.abstract_zh: 零知识证明（ZKP）是一种重要的密码学工具，在必须保护隐私的现实场景中有着广泛的应用，包括隐私保护区块链和零知识机器学习。现有的使用 GPU、FPGA 和 ASIC 的 ZKP 加速方法仅关注依赖昂贵的椭圆曲线算法的经典协议。新兴的基于哈希函数的 ZKP 协议可以大大降低算法复杂性，但它们也引入了更加多样化的计算内核，如果每个内核使用专用单元，则单个加速器芯片无法有效处理这些内核。我们的方法是利用统一的硬件架构，能够有效地支持ZKP中的通用原语，然后使用智能映射策略将各种内核灵活地映射到此类硬件，同时确保高资源利用率。我们将 UniZK 设计为这样的 ZKP 加速器，具有基于脉动阵列的硬件架构，并通过额外的本地链接和新的矢量处理模式进行了增强。我们提出了新颖的映射策略来支持不同的内核，包括数论变换、哈希函数和一般多项式计算。与相同协议的 CPU 和 GPU 实现相比，UniZK 平均提供 97 倍和 46 倍的加速，并且比以前使用不同协议的 ZKP 加速器快 840 倍。

items.title: Using Analytical Performance/Power Model and Fine-Grained DVFS to Enhance AI Accelerator Energy Efficiency.
items.abstract:
Recent advancements in deep learning have significantly increased AI processors' energy consumption, which is becoming a critical factor limiting AI development. Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling (DVFS) stands as a key method in power optimization. However, due to the latency of DVFS control in AI processors, previous works typically apply DVFS control at the granularity of a program's entire duration or sub-phases, rather than at the level of AI operators.

The advent of millisecond-level DVFS capabilities on the latest Ascend NPU platforms enables us to set frequency individually for single or multiple operators, opening up the opportunity for further enhancing energy efficiency through fine-grained DVFS control. To ensure performance is unaffected in DVFS, our work builds performance and power models for each operator. Through in-depth timeline analysis, we demonstrate that the cycle count of an operator can be modeled as a convex piecewise linear function of frequency, resulting in a performance model with an average error of 1.96%. Moreover, we build power models that incorporate temperature-dependent terms, which enhances the model's precision and results in an average error of 4.62%.

Based on our performance and power models as well as the fine-grained DVFS functionality of Ascend NPU, we propose a DVFS strategy that integrates operator classification, preprocessing, and a genetic algorithm-based search. Experiments on applications including GPT-3 training achieve a reduction in AICore (the computing component within the Ascend NPU) power by 13.44% and NPU chip power by 4.95%, while limiting performance degradation to 1.76%.
items.abstract_zh:
深度学习的最新进展显着增加了人工智能处理器的能耗，这正成为限制人工智能发展的关键因素。动态电压和频率调节（DVFS）是功率优化的关键方法。然而，由于人工智能处理器中DVFS控制的延迟，以前的工作通常在程序的整个持续时间或子阶段的粒度上应用DVFS控制，而不是在AI算子的层面上。

最新升腾NPU平台上毫秒级DVFS功能的出现使我们能够为单个或多个操作员单独设置频率，从而为通过细粒度的DVFS控制进一步提高能源效率提供了机会。为了确保 DVFS 中的性能不受影响，我们的工作为每个操作员构建了性能和功耗模型。通过深入的时间线分析，我们证明操作员的周期计数可以建模为频率的凸分段线性函数，从而得到平均误差为 1.96% 的性能模型。此外，我们构建了包含温度相关项的功率模型，这提高了模型的精度，平均误差为 4.62%。

基于我们的性能和功耗模型以及Ascend NPU的细粒度DVFS功能，我们提出了一种集成算子分类、预处理和基于遗传算法的搜索的DVFS策略。在包括 GPT-3 训练在内的应用实验中，AICore（Ascend NPU 内的计算组件）功耗降低了 13.44%，NPU 芯片功耗降低了 4.95%，同时将性能下降限制在 1.76%。

items.title: D-VSync: Decoupled Rendering and Displaying for Smartphone Graphics.
items.abstract:
Rendering service, which typically orchestrates screen display and UI through Vertical Synchronization (VSync), is an indispensable system service for user experiences of smartphone OSes (e.g., Android, OpenHarmony, and iOS). The recent trend of large high-frame-rate screens, stunning visual effects, and physics-based animations has placed unprecedented pressure on the VSync-based rendering architecture, leading to higher frame drops and longer rendering latency.

This paper proposes <u>D</u>ecoupled <u>V</u>ertical <u>Sync</u>hronization ( D-VSync ), which decouples execution and displaying in the rendering service. D-VSync allows frames to be rendered a number of VSync periods before being physically displayed on the screen. The key insight behind D-VSync to resolve the limitation of VSync is that, the decoupling enables sporadic long frames to utilize the computational power saved by common short frames, therefore providing a larger time window to tolerate workload fluctuations . Evaluation results of 75 common OS use cases and apps on OpenHarmony (Mate 40 Pro, Mate 60 Pro), 25 popular apps on Android (Google Pixel 5), and simulations of 15 mobile games show that compared to VSync, D-VSync on average reduces frame drops by 72.7%, user-perceptible stutters by 72.3%, and rendering latency by 31.1%, with only 0.13%-0.37% more power consumption. D-VSync has been integrated into HarmonyOS NEXT.
items.abstract_zh:
渲染服务通常通过垂直同步（VSync）协调屏幕显示和UI，是智能手机操作系统（例如Android、OpenHarmony和iOS）用户体验不可或缺的系统服务。最近大尺寸高帧率屏幕、令人惊叹的视觉效果和基于物理的动画的趋势给基于垂直同步的渲染架构带来了前所未有的压力，导致更高的帧丢失和更长的渲染延迟。

本文提出了<u>解耦<u>垂直<u>同步</u>时间（D-VSync），它将渲染服务中的执行和显示解耦。 D-VSync 允许帧在物理显示在屏幕上之前渲染多个 VSync 周期。 D-VSync解决VSync限制的关键在于，解耦使零星的长帧能够利用常见短帧节省的计算能力，从而提供更大的时间窗口来容忍工作负载波动。对 OpenHarmony 上 75 个常见操作系统用例和应用程序（Mate 40 Pro、Mate 60 Pro）、Android 上 25 个流行应用程序（Google Pixel 5）以及 15 款手机游戏的模拟结果表明，与 VSync 相比，D-VSync 平均可减少 72.7% 的丢帧、72.3% 的用户可感知卡顿和 31.1% 的渲染延迟，仅功耗增加0.13%-0.37%。 D-VSync已集成到HarmonyOS NEXT中。

items.title: Performance Prediction of On-NIC Network Functions with Multi-Resource Contention and Traffic Awareness.
items.abstract:
Network function (NF) offloading on SmartNICs has been widely used in modern data centers, offering benefits in host resource saving and programmability. Co-running NFs on the same SmartNICs can cause performance interference due to contention of onboard resources. To meet performance SLAs while ensuring efficient resource management, operators need mechanisms to predict NF performance under such contention. However, existing solutions lack SmartNIC-specific knowledge and exhibit limited traffic awareness, leading to poor accuracy for on-NIC NFs.

This paper proposes Yala, a novel performance predictive system for on-NIC NFs. Yala builds upon the key observation that co-located NFs contend for multiple resources, including onboard accelerators and the memory subsystem. It also facilitates traffic awareness according to the behaviors of individual resources to maintain accuracy as the external traffic attributes vary. Evaluation using Bluefield SmartNICs shows that Yala improves the prediction accuracy by 78.8% and reduces SLA violations by 92.2% compared to state-of-the-art approaches, and enables new practical usecases.
items.abstract_zh:
SmartNIC 上的网络功能 (NF) 卸载已广泛应用于现代数据中心，具有节省主机资源和可编程性的优势。在同一 SmartNIC 上共同运行 NF 可能会因板载资源争用而导致性能干扰。为了满足性能 SLA，同时确保高效的资源管理，运营商需要有机制来预测此类争用下的 NF 性能。然而，现有的解决方案缺乏特定于 SmartNIC 的知识，并且流量感知能力有限，导致 NIC NF 的准确性较差。

本文提出了 Yala，一种针对 NIC NF 的新型性能预测系统。 Yala 建立在以下关键观察之上：共置 NF 争夺多种资源，包括板载加速器和内存子系统。它还有助于根据各个资源的行为进行流量感知，以在外部流量属性变化时保持准确性。使用 Bluefield SmartNIC 进行的评估表明，与最先进的方法相比，Yala 将预测精度提高了 78.8%，将 SLA 违规减少了 92.2%，并实现了新的实际用例。

items.title: Frugal: Efficient and Economic Embedding Model Training with Commodity GPUs.
items.abstract:
Embedding models show superiority in learning representations of massive ID-type features in sparse learning scenarios such as recommendation systems (e.g., user/item IDs) and graph learning (e.g., node/edge IDs). Commodity GPUs are highly favored for their cost-efficient computing power, which is ideally suited for the low computing demand of memory-intensive embedding models. However, directly running embedding model training on commodity GPUs yields poor performance because of their deficient communication resources (including low communication bandwidth and no PCIe P2P support).

This paper presents Frugal , an embedding model training system tailored for commodity GPUs. Based on the observation that the communication between commodity GPUs must be bounced on host memory (due to no PCIe P2P support), the key idea of Frugal is proactively flushing, where each GPU proactively flushes its own parameters that other GPUs will access into host memory, thereby decoupling half of the communication overhead to non-critical paths. To alleviate the communication contention of proactively flushing on foreground training processes, Frugal assigns priorities to each flush operation, and prioritizes flushing parameters that GPUs will access while deferring others. Further, Frugal tailors a two-level priority queue to ensure high scalability for operations involving priorities. Frugal has been applied to train embedding models including recommendation models and graph embedding. Experiments indicate that Frugal can significantly increase training throughput on commodity GPUs, and achieve similar throughput compared to existing systems on datacenter GPUs with 4.0-4.3× improvement in cost-effectiveness.
items.abstract_zh:
嵌入模型在推荐系统（例如，用户/项目 ID）和图学习（例如，节点/边缘 ID）等稀疏学习场景中学习大量 ID 类型特征的表示方面表现出优越性。商用 GPU 因其经济高效的计算能力而备受青睐，非常适合内存密集型嵌入模型的低计算需求。然而，由于通信资源不足（包括通信带宽低且不支持 PCIe P2P），直接在商用 GPU 上运行嵌入模型训练的性能较差。

本文介绍了 Frugal，这是一种专为商用 GPU 量身定制的嵌入模型训练系统。根据观察，商用 GPU 之间的通信必须在主机内存上反弹（由于没有 PCIe P2P 支持），Frugal 的关键思想是主动刷新，其中每个 GPU 主动将其他 GPU 将访问的自己的参数刷新到主机内存中，从而将一半的通信开销解耦到非关键路径。为了缓解前台训练过程中主动刷新的通信争用，Frugal 为每个刷新操作分配优先级，并优先考虑 GPU 将访问的刷新参数，同时推迟其他操作。此外，Frugal还定制了两级优先级队列，以确保涉及优先级的操作具有较高的可扩展性。 Frugal 已应用于训练嵌入模型，包括推荐模型和图嵌入。实验表明，Frugal 可以显着提高商用 GPU 上的训练吞吐量，与数据中心 GPU 上的现有系统相比，可实现类似的吞吐量，成本效益提高 4.0-4.3 倍。

items.title: CRUSH: A Credit-Based Approach for Functional Unit Sharing in Dynamically Scheduled HLS.
items.abstract:
Dynamically scheduled high-level synthesis (HLS) automatically translates software code (e.g., C/C++) to dataflow circuits-networks of compute units that communicate via handshake signals. These signals schedule the circuit during runtime, allowing them to handle irregular control flow or unpredictable memory accesses efficiently, thus giving them performance merit over statically scheduled circuits produced by standard HLS tools.

To make HLS of dataflow circuits attractive and practical, we need various resource-optimization strategies to complement their performance advantage. A crucial technique is resource sharing: scarce and expensive resources (e.g., floating-point arithmetic units) are shared between multiple operations. However, this approach faces unique challenges in dataflow circuits, as an uncareful sharing strategy leads to performance degradation and circuit deadlock.

This work presents CRUSH, a strategy that enables efficient functional unit sharing in dynamically scheduled HLS. CRUSH systematically avoids sharing-introduced deadlocks: it decouples interactions of operations in the shared resource to break resource dependencies. CRUSH maintains the benefit of dynamism: it does not constrain circuit execution with a complex deadlock avoidance mechanism and seizes sharing opportunities enabled by out-of-order access to the shared unit. CRUSH is practical: it employs scalable and effective heuristics for sharing decisions. Compared to a prior strategy, CRUSH achieves an average reduction of 12% DSPs, 15% FFs, and 90% optimization runtime. CRUSH has been integrated into the Dynamatic HLS compiler (https://github.com/EPFL-LAP/dynamatic).
items.abstract_zh:
动态调度的高级综合 (HLS) 自动将软件代码（例如 C/C++）转换为数据流电路 - 通过握手信号进行通信的计算单元网络。这些信号在运行时调度电路，使它们能够有效地处理不规则的控制流或不可预测的内存访问，从而使它们的性能优于标准 HLS 工具生成的静态调度电路。

为了使数据流电路的 HLS 有吸引力且实用，我们需要各种资源优化策略来补充其性能优势。一项关键技术是资源共享：稀缺且昂贵的资源（例如浮点运算单元）在多个操作之间共享。然而，这种方法在数据流电路中面临着独特的挑战，因为不小心的共享策略会导致性能下降和电路死锁。

这项工作提出了 CRUSH，这是一种在动态调度的 HLS 中实现高效功能单元共享的策略。 CRUSH 系统地避免了共享引入的死锁：它解耦共享资源中操作的交互以打破资源依赖性。 CRUSH 保持了动态性的优点：它不使用复杂的死锁避免机制来限制电路执行，并抓住对共享单元的乱序访问所带来的共享机会。 CRUSH 很实用：它采用可扩展且有效的启发式方法来共享决策。与之前的策略相比，CRUSH 平均减少了 12% DSP、15% FF 和 90% 优化运行时间。 CRUSH 已集成到 Dynamatic HLS 编译器 (https://github.com/EPFL-LAP/dynamatic) 中。

items.title: Optimizing Quantum Circuits, Fast and Slow.
items.abstract: Optimizing quantum circuits is critical: the number of quantum operations needs to be minimized for a successful evaluation of a circuit on a quantum processor. In this paper we unify two disparate ideas for optimizing quantum circuits, rewrite rules, which are fast standard optimizer passes, and unitary synthesis, which is slow, requiring a search through the space of circuits. We present a clean, unifying framework for thinking of rewriting and resynthesis as abstract circuit transformations. We then present a radically simple algorithm, guoq, for optimizing quantum circuits that exploits the synergies of rewriting and resynthesis. Our extensive evaluation demonstrates the ability of guoq to strongly outperform existing optimizers on a wide range of benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 优化量子电路至关重要：为了成功评估量子处理器上的电路，需要最大限度地减少量子操作的数量。在本文中，我们统一了两种不同的优化量子电路的思想：重写规则（快速的标准优化器传递）和酉合成（速度很慢，需要搜索电路空间）。我们提出了一个干净、统一的框架，用于将重写和重新综合视为抽象电路转换。然后，我们提出了一种极其简单的算法，guoq，用于优化量子电路，利用重写和重新合成的协同作用。我们的广泛评估表明，guoq 在广泛的基准测试中远远优于现有优化器的能力。

items.title: Design and Operation of Shared Machine Learning Clusters on Campus.
items.abstract:
The rapid advancement of large machine learning (ML) models has driven universities worldwide to invest heavily in GPU clusters. Effectively sharing these resources among multiple users is essential for maximizing both utilization and accessibility. However, managing shared GPU clusters presents significant challenges, ranging from system configuration to fair resource allocation among users.

This paper introduces SING, a full-stack solution tailored to simplify shared GPU cluster management. Aimed at addressing the pressing need for efficient resource sharing with limited staffing, SING enhances operational efficiency by reducing maintenance costs and optimizing resource utilization. We provide a comprehensive overview of its four extensible architectural layers, explore the features of each layer, and share insights from real-world deployment, including usage patterns and incident management strategies.

As part of our commitment to advancing shared ML cluster management, we open-source SING's resources to support the development and operation of similar systems.
items.abstract_zh:
大型机器学习 (ML) 模型的快速发展促使世界各地的大学大力投资 GPU 集群。在多个用户之间有效地共享这些资源对于最大限度地提高利用率和可访问性至关重要。然而，管理共享 GPU 集群面临着巨大的挑战，从系统配置到用户之间公平的资源分配。

本文介绍了 SING，这是一种专为简化共享 GPU 集群管理而定制的全栈解决方案。 SING 旨在解决在人员有限的情况下实现高效资源共享的迫切需求，通过降低维护成本和优化资源利用率来提高运营效率。我们全面概述了其四个可扩展架构层，探讨了每个层的功能，并分享了实际部署的见解，包括使用模式和事件管理策略。

作为我们致力于推进共享 ML 集群管理的一部分，我们开源了 SING 的资源以支持类似系统的开发和运营。

items.title: Fast On-device LLM Inference with NPUs.
items.abstract:
On-device inference for Large Language Models (LLMs), driven by increasing privacy concerns and advancements of mobile-sized models, has gained significant interest. However, even mobile-sized LLMs (e.g., Gemma-2B) encounter unacceptably high inference latency, often bottlenecked by the prefill stage in tasks like screen UI understanding.

We present llm.npu, the first LLM inference system utilizing on-device Neural Processing Unit (NPU) offloading to reduce prefill latency. llm.npu enhances NPU offloading efficiency by re-constructing the prompt and model in three levels: (1) At prompt level, it divides variable-length prompts into multiple fixed-sized chunks while maintaining data dependencies; (2) At tensor level, it identifies and extracts significant outliers to run on the CPU/GPU in parallel with minimal overhead; (3) At block level, it schedules Transformer blocks in an out-of-order manner to the CPU/GPU and NPU based on their hardware affinity and sensitivity to accuracy. Compared to competitive baselines, llm.npu achieves 22.4x faster prefill speed and 30.7x energy savings on average, and up to 32.8x speedup in an end-to-end real-world application. For the first time, llm.npu achieves more than 1,000 tokens/sec prefilling for a billion-sized model.
items.abstract_zh:
在日益增长的隐私问题和移动规模模型的进步的推动下，大型语言模型 (LLM) 的设备端推理引起了人们的极大兴趣。然而，即使是移动大小的 LLM（例如 Gemma-2B）也会遇到不可接受的高推理延迟，通常会受到屏幕 UI 理解等任务中预填充阶段的瓶颈。

我们推出了 llm.npu，这是第一个利用设备上神经处理单元 (NPU) 卸载来减少预填充延迟的 LLM 推理系统。 llm.npu 通过在三个层面上重构提示和模型来提高 NPU 卸载效率：（1）在提示层面，它将可变长度提示划分为多个固定大小的块，同时保持数据依赖关系； (2) 在张量级别，它识别并提取显着的异常值，以最小的开销在 CPU/GPU 上并行运行； (3) 在块级别，它根据硬件亲和性和对精度的敏感度，以乱序方式将 Transformer 块调度到 CPU/GPU 和 NPU。与竞争基准相比，llm.npu 的预填充速度平均提高了 22.4 倍，节能 30.7 倍，在端到端实际应用中加速高达 32.8 倍。 llm.npu 首次实现了十亿规模模型每秒超过 1,000 个代币的预填充。

items.title: Automatic Tracing in Task-Based Runtime Systems.
items.abstract: Implicitly parallel task-based runtime systems often perform dynamic analysis to discover dependencies in and extract parallelism from sequential programs. Dependence analysis becomes expensive as task granularity drops below a threshold. Tracing techniques have been developed where programmers annotate repeated program fragments (traces) issued by the application, and the runtime system memoizes the dependence analysis for those fragments, greatly reducing overhead when the fragments are executed again. However, manual trace annotation can be brittle and not easily applicable to complex programs built through the composition of independent components. We introduce Apophenia, a system that automatically traces the dependence analysis of task-based runtime systems, removing the burden of manual annotations from programmers and enabling new and complex programs to be traced. Apophenia identifies traces dynamically through a series of dynamic string analyses, which find repeated program fragments in the stream of tasks issued to the runtime system. We show that Apophenia is able to come between 0.92x--1.03x the performance of manually traced programs, and is able to effectively trace previously untraced programs to yield speedups of between 0.91x--2.82x on the Perlmutter and Eos supercomputers.
items.abstract_zh: 基于隐式并行任务的运行时系统通常执行动态分析，以发现顺序程序中的依赖性并从中提取并行性。当任务粒度低于阈值时，依赖性分析变得昂贵。跟踪技术已经被开发出来，程序员可以注释应用程序发出的重复程序片段（跟踪），并且运行时系统会记住这些片段的依赖性分析，从而大大减少再次执行片段时的开销。然而，手动跟踪注释可能很脆弱，并且不容易适用于通过独立组件的组合构建的复杂程序。我们推出了 Apophenia，一个可以自动跟踪基于任务的运行时系统的依赖分析的系统，消除了程序员手动注释的负担，并能够跟踪新的复杂程序。 Apophenia 通过一系列动态字符串分析动态识别跟踪，在发送到运行时系统的任务流中查找重复的程序片段。我们表明，Apophenia 的性能能够达到手动跟踪程序的 0.92 倍--1.03 倍，并且能够有效地跟踪以前未跟踪的程序，从而在 Perlmutter 和 Eos 超级计算机上产生 0.91 倍--2.82 倍的加速。

items.title: Composing Distributed Computations Through Task and Kernel Fusion.
items.abstract: We introduce Diffuse, a system that dynamically performs task and kernel fusion in distributed, task-based runtime systems. The key component of Diffuse is an intermediate representation of distributed computation that enables the necessary analyses for the fusion of distributed tasks to be performed in a scalable manner. We pair task fusion with a JIT compiler to fuse together the kernels within fused tasks. We show empirically that Diffuse's intermediate representation is general enough to be a target for two real-world, task-based libraries (cuPyNumeric and Legate Sparse), letting Diffuse find optimization opportunities across function and library boundaries. Diffuse accelerates unmodified applications developed by composing task-based libraries by 1.86x on average (geo-mean), and by between 0.93x--10.7x on up to 128 GPUs. Diffuse also finds optimization opportunities missed by the original application developers, enabling high-level Python programs to match or exceed the performance of an explicitly parallel MPI library.
items.abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Diffuse，一个在分布式、基于任务的运行时系统中动态执行任务和内核融合的系统。 Diffuse 的关键组件是分布式计算的中间表示，它使得能够以可扩展的方式执行分布式任务融合的必要分析。我们将任务融合与 JIT 编译器配对，以将融合任务中的内核融合在一起。我们凭经验证明，Diffuse 的中间表示足够通用，足以成为两个现实世界中基于任务的库（cuPyNumeric 和 Legate Sparse）的目标，让 Diffuse 找到跨函数和库边界的优化机会。 Diffuse 将通过组合基于任务的库开发的未修改应用程序平均加速 1.86 倍（地理平均值），在最多 128 个 GPU 上加速 0.93 倍--10.7 倍。 Diffuse 还发现了原始应用程序开发人员错过的优化机会，使高级 Python 程序能够匹配或超过显式并行 MPI 库的性能。

items.title: Debugger Toolchain Validation via Cross-Level Debugging.
items.abstract: Ensuring the correctness of debugger toolchains is of paramount importance, as they play a vital role in understanding and resolving programming errors during software development. Bugs hidden within these toolchains can significantly mislead developers. Unfortunately, comprehensive testing of debugger toolchains is lacking due to the absence of effective test oracles. Existing studies on debugger toolchain validation have primarily focused on validating the debug information within optimized executables by comparing the traces between debugging optimized and unoptimized executables (i.e., different executables) in the debugger, under the assumption that the traces obtained from debugging unoptimized executables serve as a reliable oracle. However, these techniques suffer from inherent limitations, as compiler optimizations can drastically alter source code elements, variable representations, and instruction order, rendering the traces obtained from debugging different executables incomparable and failing to uncover bugs in debugger toolchains when debugging unoptimized executables. To address these limitations, we propose a novel concept called Cross-Level Debugging (CLD) for validating the debugger toolchain. CLD compares the traces obtained from debugging the same executable using source-level and instruction-level strategies within the same debugger. The core insight of CLD is that the execution traces obtained from different debugging levels for the same executable should adhere to specific relationships, regardless of whether the executable is generated with or without optimization. We formulate three key relations in CLD: reachability preservation of program locations, order preservation for reachable program locations, and value consistency at program locations, which apply to traces at different debugging levels. We implement D evil , a practical framework that employs these relations for debugger toolchain validation. We evaluate the effectiveness of D evil using two widely used production debugger toolchains, GDB and LLDB. Ultimately, D evil successfully identified 27 new bug reports, of which 18 have been confirmed and 12 have been fixed by developers.
items.abstract_zh: 确保调试器工具链的正确性至关重要，因为它们在软件开发过程中理解和解决编程错误方面发挥着至关重要的作用。这些工具链中隐藏的错误可能会严重误导开发人员。不幸的是，由于缺乏有效的测试预言机，缺乏对调试器工具链的全面测试。现有的关于调试器工具链验证的研究主要集中在通过比较调试器中调试优化的可执行文件和未优化的可执行文件（即不同的可执行文件）之间的跟踪来验证优化的可执行文件中的调试信息，假设从调试未优化的可执行文件获得的跟踪充当可靠的预言机。然而，这些技术存在固有的局限性，因为编译器优化可能会极大地改变源代码元素、变量表示和指令顺序，从而使从调试不同可执行文件获得的跟踪变得不可比较，并且在调试未优化的可执行文件时无法发现调试器工具链中的错误。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种称为跨级调试（CLD）的新概念，用于验证调试器工具链。 CLD 比较在同一调试器中使用源级和指令级策略调试同一可执行文件所获得的跟踪。 CLD 的核心见解是，从同一可执行文件的不同调试级别获得的执行跟踪应该遵循特定的关系，无论该可执行文件是经过优化还是未经优化生成的。我们在CLD中制定了三个关键关系：程序位置的可达性保留、可达程序位置的顺序保留以及程序位置的值一致性，适用于不同调试级别的跟踪。我们实现了 Dvil，一个实用的框架，它利用这些关系来验证调试器工具链。我们使用两种广泛使用的生产调试器工具链 GDB 和 LLDB 来评估 Dvil 的有效性。最终，Dvil成功识别出27个新的Bug报告，其中18个已得到确认，12个已被开发者修复。

items.title: QECC-Synth: A Layout Synthesizer for Quantum Error Correction Codes on Sparse Architectures.
items.abstract: Quantum Error Correction (QEC) codes are essential for achieving fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). However, their implementation faces significant challenges due to disparity between required dense qubit connectivity and sparse hardware architectures. Current approaches often either underutilize QEC circuit features or focus on manual designs tailored to specific codes and architectures, limiting their capability and generality. In response, we introduce QECC-Synth, an automated compiler for QEC code implementation that addresses these challenges. We leverage the ancilla bridge technique tailored to the requirements of QEC circuits and introduces a systematic classification of its design space flexibilities. We then formalize this problem using the MaxSAT framework to optimize these flexibilities. Evaluation shows that our method significantly outperforms existing methods while demonstrating broader applicability across diverse QEC codes and hardware architectures.
items.abstract_zh: 量子纠错（QEC）代码对于实现容错量子计算（FTQC）至关重要。然而，由于所需的密集量子位连接和稀疏硬件架构之间的差异，它们的实现面临着重大挑战。当前的方法通常要么未充分利用 QEC 电路功能，要么侧重于针对特定代码和架构量身定制的手动设计，从而限制了其功能和通用性。为此，我们推出了 QECC-Synth，这是一种用于 QEC 代码实现的自动编译器，可以解决这些挑战。我们利用根据 QEC 电路的要求量身定制的辅助桥技术，并对其设计空间灵活性进行了系统分类。然后，我们使用 MaxSAT 框架将这个问题形式化，以优化这些灵活性。评估表明，我们的方法显着优于现有方法，同时在不同的 QEC 代码和硬件架构中展示了更广泛的适用性。

items.title: Medusa: Accelerating Serverless LLM Inference with Materialization.
items.abstract:
Serverless is a promising paradigm to provide scalable, cost-efficient, and easy-to-use model inference services. However, the cold start of model inference functions requires loading models to the devices, which incurs high latencies and undermines the benefits of serverless computing. In LLMs, things get even worse since two extra stages are introduced: a KV cache initialization stage that profiles and anticipates memory reservation for KV cache, and a capturing stage which dynamically constructs CUDA graphs for different batch sizes. Both stages are paramount to the inference performance, but become the main culprit of cold start latency.

This paper proposes Medusa to mitigate the long cold start latency through state materialization. Instead of dynamic profiling and construction in the runtime, Medusa materializes the CUDA graphs as well as the information needed by the KV cache initialization in the offline phase, and restores them efficiently in the online phase. Medusa further introduces two novel techniques -- offline-online cooperated parameters restoration and triggering-kernels enhanced kernel address restoration -- to tackle non-deterministic issues in CUDA graphs. Medusa successfully materializes and restores CUDA graphs across 10 models (with a total of 139364 CUDA graph nodes), and reduces the latency of model loading by 42.5%. Under real-world LLM inference workloads, Medusa reduces the tail latency of the time to first token (TTFT) by 53.0%.
items.abstract_zh:
无服务器是一种很有前途的范例，可提供可扩展、经济高效且易于使用的模型推理服务。然而，模型推理功能的冷启动需要将模型加载到设备上，这会导致高延迟并削弱无服务器计算的优势。在 LLM 中，由于引入了两个额外阶段，事情变得更糟：KV 缓存初始化阶段，用于分析和预测 KV 缓存的内存预留；以及捕获阶段，用于动态构建不同批量大小的 CUDA 图。这两个阶段对于推理性能都至关重要，但却成为冷启动延迟的主要原因。

本文提出 Medusa 通过状态物化来减轻较长的冷启动延迟。 Medusa 不是在运行时动态分析和构建，而是在离线阶段具体化 CUDA 图以及 KV 缓存初始化所需的信息，并在在线阶段高效地恢复它们。 Medusa 进一步引入了两种新颖的技术——离线在线协作参数恢复和触发内核增强的内核地址恢复——来解决 CUDA 图中的非确定性问题。 Medusa 成功实现并恢复了 10 个模型（总共 139364 个 CUDA 图节点）的 CUDA 图，并将模型加载延迟降低了 42.5%。在现实世界的 LLM 推理工作负载下，Medusa 将首次令牌时间 (TTFT) 的尾部延迟降低了 53.0%。

items.title: Tally: Non-Intrusive Performance Isolation for Concurrent Deep Learning Workloads.
items.abstract: GPU underutilization is a significant concern in many production deep learning clusters, leading to prolonged job queues and increased operational expenses. A promising solution to this inefficiency is GPU sharing, which improves resource utilization by allowing multiple workloads to execute concurrently on a single GPU. However, deploying GPU sharing in production settings faces critical obstacles due to the limitations of existing mechanisms, including high integration costs, inadequate performance isolation, and limited application compatibility. To address these issues, we introduce Tally, a non-intrusive GPU sharing mechanism that provides robust performance isolation and comprehensive workload compatibility. The key to Tally's robust performance isolation capability lies in its fine-grained thread-block-level GPU kernel scheduling strategy, which allows the system to effectively mitigate interference caused by workload co-execution. We evaluate Tally on a diverse range of workloads and show that it incurs an average overhead of only 7.2% on the 99 th -percentile latency of high-priority inference tasks when executed concurrently with best-effort training workloads, compared to 188.9% overhead exhibited by the state-of-the-art GPU sharing systems like TGS, while achieving over 80% of TGS's system throughput.
items.abstract_zh: GPU 利用率不足是许多生产深度学习集群中的一个重要问题，导致作业队列延长和运营费用增加。解决这种低效率问题的一个有希望的解决方案是 GPU 共享，它允许多个工作负载在单个 GPU 上同时执行，从而提高资源利用率。然而，由于现有机制的限制，在生产环境中部署 GPU 共享面临着严重的障碍，包括集成成本高、性能隔离不足以及应用程序兼容性有限。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了 Tally，一种非侵入式 GPU 共享机制，可提供强大的性能隔离和全面的工作负载兼容性。 Tally强大的性能隔离能力的关键在于其细粒度的线程块级GPU内核调度策略，可以让系统有效减轻工作负载共同执行带来的干扰。我们在各种工作负载上对 Tally 进行了评估，结果表明，当与尽力而为的训练工作负载同时执行时，它在高优先级推理任务的第 99% 延迟上产生的平均开销仅为 7.2%，而 TGS 等最先进的 GPU 共享系统的开销为 188.9%，同时实现了 TGS 系统吞吐量的 80% 以上。

items.title: Selectively Uniform Concurrency Testing.
items.abstract: Buggy behaviors in concurrent programs are notoriously elusive, as they may manifest only in few of exponentially many possible thread interleavings. Randomized concurrency testing techniques probabilistically sample from (instead of enumerating) the vast search space and have been shown to be both an effective as well as a scalable class of algorithms for automated discovery of concurrency bugs. In this work we focus on the key desirable characteristic of black-box randomized concurrency testing algorithms --- uniformity of exploration. Unfortunately, prior randomized algorithms acutely fall short on uniformity and, as a result, struggle to expose bugs that only manifest in few, infrequent interleavings. Towards this, we show that, indeed, a sampling strategy for uniformly sampling over the interleaving space, is eminently achievable with minimal additional information for broad classes of programs. Moreover, when applied to a carefully selected subset of program events, this interleaving-uniformity strategy allows for an effective exploration of program behaviors. We present an online randomized concurrency testing algorithm named Selectively Uniform Random Walk (SURW) that builds on these insights. SURW is the first of its class to achieve interleaving-uniformity for a wide class of programs, or an arbitrary subset of events thereof. This property translates to effective behavioral exploration should a subset with desirable characteristics be selected. Extensive evaluation on leading concurrency benchmarks suggests SURW is able to expose more bugs and significantly faster than comparable randomized algorithms. In addition, we show that SURW is able to explore both the space of interleavings and behaviors more uniformly on real-world programs.
items.abstract_zh: 众所周知，并发程序中的错误行为难以捉摸，因为它们可能仅在指数级众多可能的线程交错中的少数几个中显现出来。随机并发测试技术从巨大的搜索空间中进行概率采样（而不是枚举），并且已被证明是自动发现并发错误的有效且可扩展的一类算法。在这项工作中，我们重点关注黑盒随机并发测试算法的关键理想特征——探索的一致性。不幸的是，先前的随机算法在一致性方面严重不足，因此很难暴露仅在少数、不频繁的交错中出现的错误。为此，我们表明，实际上，对于广泛的程序类别来说，在交错空间上均匀采样的采样策略可以通过最少的附加信息来实现。此外，当应用于精心选择的程序事件子集时，这种交错一致性策略可以有效地探索程序行为。我们提出了一种基于这些见解的在线随机并发测试算法，名为选择性均匀随机游走 (SURW)。 SURW 是同类产品中第一个为多种程序或其任意事件子集实现交错一致性的产品。如果选择具有所需特征的子集，则该属性转化为有效的行为探索。对领先并发基准的广泛评估表明，SURW 能够暴露更多错误，并且比同类随机算法更快。此外，我们还表明 SURW 能够在现实世界的程序中更统一地探索交错空间和行为。

items.title: Has Machine Learning for Systems Reached an Inflection Point?
items.abstract:
A wide range of research areas - from natural language processing to computer vision and software engineering - have been (or are being) revolutionized by machine learning and artificial intelligence. Each of these areas went through an inflection point where they transitioned from ML as one of many approaches to ML becoming a predominant approach of the field. No example symbolizes this better than the AlexNet paper from 2012, which fundamentally transformed the field of computer vision.

Computer systems remain a notable exception. In this talk, I will discuss emerging trends in the ML for Systems domain, how systems differ from these other areas, and what an ''AlexNet Moment'' for systems might look like. Along the way, I will describe a framework for categorizing work in the field and discuss emerging research problems and opportunities.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习和人工智能已经（或正在）彻底改变了从自然语言处理到计算机视觉和软件工程的广泛研究领域。这些领域中的每一个都经历了一个拐点，从机器学习作为众多方法之一转变为该领域的主要方法。没有比 2012 年 AlexNet 论文更能体现这一点的例子了，该论文从根本上改变了计算机视觉领域。

计算机系统仍然是一个明显的例外。在本次演讲中，我将讨论系统机器学习领域的新兴趋势、系统与其他领域有何不同，以及系统的“AlexNet 时刻”可能是什么样子。在此过程中，我将描述一个对该领域工作进行分类的框架，并讨论新出现的研究问题和机遇。

items.title: Voyager: Input-Adaptive Algebraic Transformations for High-Performance Graph Neural Networks.
items.abstract:
Graph neural networks (GNNs) are gaining popularity in diverse application domains and growing in complexity. As a result, it is crucial to achieve high-performance GNN execution. Among various techniques, algebraic transformations, including operator reordering and operator fusion, have been successfully applied to improve the computation and memory access efficiencies of DNN models. However, directly applying these methods to GNNs results in suboptimal performance. This is primarily due to the diversity of input graph structures, making it challenging to predict performance benefits. Additionally, the complex dependencies introduced by these input graph structures limit the effectiveness of existing optimization techniques.

To address these challenges, we propose Voyager , an input-adaptive compiler designed specifically for GNNs.
